requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue, unless indicated
otherwise.
requirements.object: date of issue

requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be applicable to all Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB').
requirements.object: Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB')

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, Urban Co-operative Banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
requirements.object: as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' refers to joint deposit accounts styled
as 'either or survivor', or 'anyone or survivor', or 'former or survivor' or 'latter
or survivor' or any other such clause.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' refers to joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor', or '

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the
borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with
the credit facility.
requirements.object: credit to the borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the credit facility

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Bank induced transaction means a transaction in the account initiated by a
UCB as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments,
penalties, taxes.
requirements.object: account initiated by a UCB as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall put in place approved policies and establish periodic review
mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
requirements.object: policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

requirements.full_sentence:
An illustrative list of reviews to be carried out by the Board or Committee to which
powers have been delegated are given below
<image>
(1) The Board / Customer Service Committee of Board shall review the progress
in providing ramps at the entrance of bank branches and status of making all new
ATMs as talking ATMs with Braille keyboards.
requirements.object: providing ramps at the entrance of bank branches and status of making all new ATMs as talking ATMs with Braille keyboards

requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to ensuring that the service to customers is
made available exactly at the commencement of business hours, a UCB may fix the
working hours of the staff 15 minutes before the start of business hours at its branches
in metropolitan and urban centres.
requirements.object: of the staff 15 minutes before the start of business hours at its branches in metropolitan and urban centres

requirements.full_sentence:
Time norms for specified business transactions shall be displayed prominently in
the banking hall so that it attracts the customers' attention as well as that of the
employees for adherence.
requirements.object: the banking hall so that it attracts the customers' attention as well as that of the employees for adherence

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall issue instructions that all customers who enter the banking hall before
the close of business hours may be attended to before closing the counters.
requirements.object: customers who enter the banking hall before the close of business hours may be attended to before closing the counters

requirements.full_sentence:
No particular banking hours have been prescribed by law and a UCB may fix, after
due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it i.e., to work
in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than Sunday or to function
on Sundays in addition to the normal working days, subject to observing normal
working hours for public transactions.
requirements.object: to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it i.e., to work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than Sunday or to function on Sundays in addition to the normal working days

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of
closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday.
requirements.object: the public / its customers of its intention of closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
note to avoid infringement of any other relevant local laws such as Shops and
Establishment Act, etc.
requirements.object: of any other relevant local laws such as Shops and Establishment Act, etc

conditions:
if any, regarding a UCB's obligations to its staff under Industrial
Awards / Settlements
requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions, if any, regarding a UCB's obligations to its staff under Industrial
Awards / Settlements, shall be complied with.

Clearing House authority of the place
shall also be consulted in this regard.
requirements.object: this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
Staff at the counters may undertake the following transactions during the extended
business hours (branches to indicate the timings)
(1) non-voucher generating transactions:
requirements.object: during the extended business hours (branches to indicate the timings) (1) non-voucher generating transactions:

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall devise appropriate procedures to ensure that no counter remains
unattended during the business hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the
customers by making adequate relief arrangements as may be necessary.
requirements.object: ensure that no counter remains unattended during the business hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the cust

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall equip its branches with ultraviolet lamps so that detection of fake
currency is made easy.
requirements.object: ultraviolet lamps so that detection of fake currency is made easy

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall install dual display note counting machines at the payment counters
of its branches for the use of its customers towards building confidence in the minds
of the public to accept note packets secured with paper bands.
requirements.object: counting machines at the payment counters of its branches for the use of its customers towards building confidence in the mi

requirements.full_sentence:
Each employee of a UCB shall wear on his person, identity badge with photograph
and name prominently displayed on it.
requirements.object: identity badge with photograph and name prominently displayed on it

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure periodic change of duties and job rotation among its
employees.
requirements.object: duties and job rotation among its employees

requirements.full_sentence:
The employees of a UCB shall be trained to
develop the right kind of attitude towards customer service, and empathy towards
customer needs and expectations.
requirements.object: the right kind of attitude towards customer service, and empathy towards customer needs and expectations

requirements.full_sentence:
Training programmes may be so devised as to
bring about positive attitudinal changes compatible to customer orientation.
requirements.object: to bring about positive attitudinal changes compatible to customer orientation

requirements.full_sentence:
Training to new recruits of a UCB shall be a precursor to other follow-up training
programmes.
requirements.object: other follow-up training programmes

requirements.full_sentence:
All new recruits, i.e., clerks / officers shall be necessarily exposed to
induction programme immediately after recruitment.
requirements.object: induction programme immediately after recruitment

requirements.full_sentence:
The system of reward / recognition shall be such that it puts an indifferent
employee to a considerable disadvantage - psychologically and even financially.
requirements.object: puts an indifferent employee to a considerable disadvantage - psychologically and even financially

requirements.full_sentence:
Indifferent and casual approach to work (customer service) shall not go unnoticed,
giving such employees wrong signals.
requirements.object: employees wrong signals

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure a fair system whereby
employees are gauged or rated in the area of customer service and good work is
rewarded.
requirements.object: whereby employees are gauged or rated in the area of customer service and good work is rewarded

requirements.full_sentence: Placement of employees in customer contact slots shall be on a selective basis.
requirements.object: basis

requirements.full_sentence:
Cases of deliberate recalcitrance and disregard of customer
service spirit should be taken note of and kept in concerned employees' service
records apart from taking other action against such employees.
requirements.object: and kept in concerned employees' service records apart from taking other action against such employees

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall keep its systems and procedures in trim, by a continuous process of
introduction of new procedures that may be required and by doing away with unwanted
ones.
requirements.object: procedures in trim, by a continuous process of introduction of new procedures that may be required and by doing away with unwante

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall subject itself to an audit approach towards its customer service points
at grass root levels and also at policy prescription and macro levels in the matter of
extension of customer service.
requirements.object: audit approach towards its customer service points at grass root levels and also at policy prescription and macro levels in the m

requirements.full_sentence:
Senior officials while visiting the branches shall also give priority to the customer
service aspects.
requirements.object: the customer service aspects

requirements.full_sentence:
The senior official may counter check the actual 'branch atmosphere'
by having in hand a report on customer service submitted by the branch.
requirements.object: 'branch atmosphere' by having in hand a report on customer service submitted by the branch

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall bestow attention to providing adequate space, proper furniture,
drinking water facilities, clean environment, (which include keeping the walls free of
posters) etc., in its premises to enable conduct of banking transactions smoothly and
more comfortably.
requirements.object: adequate space, proper furniture, drinking water facilities, clean environment, (which include keeping the walls free of

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer education both regarding rights and responsibilities in dealing with a
UCB shall be viewed as a fundamental issue in any attempt to improve customer
service.
requirements.object: fundamental issue in any attempt to improve customer service

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer shall be made aware not only of the various schemes and services
offered by a UCB, but also about the formalities, procedures, legal requirements and
limitations in the matter of providing services by the UCB, through a proper mix of
advertisements, literature, interface, seminars, etc.
requirements.object: only of the various schemes and services offered by a UCB, but also about the formalities, procedures, legal requirements and limita

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall involve its employees
in all customer education programmes.
requirements.object: all customer education programmes

requirements.full_sentence:
In view of the incidents involving terrorists / dacoits, a UCB shall review and
improve upon the existing security system in its branches so as to instil confidence
amongst the employees and the public.
requirements.object: the existing security system in its branches so as to instil confidence amongst the employees and the public

requirements.full_sentence:
Regular drill / training to the security staff shall
be ensured.

All branches of a UCB, except very small ones, shall have "Enquiry" or "May I help
you" counters.
requirements.object: I help you" counters

requirements.full_sentence:
Such counters may exclusively attend to enquiries or may be combined
with other functions depending upon the requirement.
requirements.object: or may be combined with other functions depending upon the requirement

requirements.full_sentence:
As far as possible, such
counters shall be near the entry point to the banking hall.
requirements.object: point to the banking hall

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall adhere to the following instructions on display of information.
requirements.object: instructions on display of information

requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum size of the Notice Board may be 2 feet by 2 feet as Board of such a
size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters.
requirements.object: 2 feet as Board of such a size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
have a Comprehensive Notice Board to display information at its branches as per the
format given in Annex I.
requirements.object: Board to display information at its branches as per the format given in Annex I

requirements.full_sentence:
While displaying the information in the notice board, a UCB shall adhere to the
following principles:
(1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis.
requirements.object: principles: (1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall indicate the
date up to which it was updated (incorporated in the display board).
requirements.object: to which it was updated (incorporated in the display board)

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Though the UCB shall have discretion on pattern, colour and design of the
board, the display shall be kept simple and readable.
requirements.object: colour and design of the board, the display shall be kept simple and readable

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The notice board shall be in bilingual in Hindi speaking states and trilingual in
other states.
requirements.object: Hindi speaking states and trilingual in other states

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The notice board shall specifically indicate wherever recent changes have
been done.
requirements.object: changes have been done

conditions:
If there is a recent change in the SSI loan products offered by a
UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: If there is a recent change in the SSI loan products offered by a
UCB, the information on the SSI loan products may be displayed as 'We offer
SSI loans / products (changed on ……….)'.
requirements.object: offer SSI loans / products (changed on ………

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The notice board shall also indicate a list of items on which detailed
information is available in booklet form.
requirements.object: of items on which detailed information is available in booklet form

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above Board, a UCB shall also display details such as 'Name of
the UCB / branch, Working Days, Working Hours and Weekly Off-days' outside the
branch premises.
requirements.object: as 'Name of the UCB / branch, Working Days, Working Hours and Weekly Off-days' outside the branch premises

requirements.full_sentence:
The detailed information as indicated in Paragraph (D) of Annex I may be made
available in various booklets / brochures as decided by a UCB.
requirements.object: various booklets / brochures as decided by a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
These booklets /
brochures may be kept in a separate file / folder in the form of 'replaceable pages' so
as to facilitate copying and updation.
requirements.object: separate file / folder in the form of 'replaceable pages' so as to facilitate copying and updation

requirements.full_sentence:
In this connection, a UCB shall also adhere to
the following broad guidelines:
(1) The file / folder may be kept at the customer lobby in the branch or at the 'May
I Help You' counter or at a place that is frequented by most of the customers.
requirements.object: following broad guidelines: (1) The file / folder may be kept at the customer lobby in the branch or at the 'May I Help You' counte

requirements.full_sentence:
bilingual in Hindi speaking states and
trilingual in other states) shall be taken into account.

(3) It shall be ensured while printing the booklets that the font size is minimum
Arial 10 so that the customers are able to easily read the same.
requirements.object: the booklets that the font size is minimum Arial 10 so that the customers are able to easily read the same

requirements.full_sentence: (4) Copies of booklets shall be made available to the customers on request.
requirements.object: the customers on request

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall make available the detailed information indicated in Paragraph (D) of
requirements.object: information indicated in Paragraph (D) of

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that the customers are able to easily access
the relevant information from the Home Page of the UCB's website.
requirements.object: customers are able to easily access the relevant information from the Home Page of the UCB's website

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall
adhere to the broad guidelines relating to dating of material, legibility, etc., while
placing the same on its websites.
requirements.object: guidelines relating to dating of material, legibility, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall consider displaying all the information that have to be given in the
booklet form in the touch screen by placing them in the information kiosks.
requirements.object: information that have to be given in the booklet form in the touch screen by placing them in the information kiosks

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the mandatory displays shall not be obstructed in any way and given priority
over the other display boards.
requirements.object: way and given priority over the other display boards

requirements.full_sentence:
However, while fixing service charges, for various types of services like charges for
cheque collection, etc., the UCB shall ensure that they are reasonable and are not out
of line with the average cost of providing these services.
requirements.object: reasonable and are not out of line with the average cost of providing these services

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall also take care
to ensure that customers with low volume of activities are not penalised.
requirements.object: ensure that customers with low volume of activities are not penalised

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall leverage technology available with it and the telecom providers to
ensure that the charges levied by it for sending SMS alerts are levied on all customers
on actual usage basis.
requirements.object: it and the telecom providers to ensure that the charges levied by it for sending SMS alerts are levied on all custo

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall adopt / follow the principles outlined below for ensuring
reasonableness in fixing and communicating service charges.
requirements.object: principles outlined below for ensuring reasonableness in fixing and communicating service charges

requirements.full_sentence:
Identification of Basic Banking Services: A UCB shall identify basic banking
services based on the following broad parameters:
(1) Nature of transactions
Table 1
Sr.
requirements.object: based on the following broad parameters: (1) Nature of transactions Table 1 Sr

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Banking services that are ordinarily availed by individuals in the middle and
lower segments, shall be the first parameter.

conditions: When the above transactions occur in different delivery channels
requirements.full_sentence:
(b) When the above transactions occur in different delivery channels, for the
purpose of pricing, they may be treated on a separate footing.
requirements.object: separate footing

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Low value of transactions with customers / public up to the ceiling as given
below shall be the second parameter:
− Remittances up to ₹10,000 in each instance
− Collections below ₹10,000 in each instance
(Foreign exchange transactions valued up to $500/-)
(3) Based on the above-mentioned two parameters, an illustrative list of services
is given below.
requirements.object: − Remittances up to ₹10,000 in each instance − Collections below ₹10,000 in each instance (Foreign exchange transactions valu

requirements.full_sentence:
The list of services identified is only an indicative one and the
UCB may, at its discretion, include within the category of basic services such
additional services as it may consider appropriate.
requirements.object: include within the category of basic services such additional services as it may consider appropriate

requirements.full_sentence:
Offering basic banking services outside the scope of bundled products: A
UCB shall make available the basic banking services at reasonable prices / charges
<image>
and towards this, basic services shall be delivered outside the scope of bundled
products.
requirements.object: banking services at reasonable prices / charges <image> and towards this, basic services shall be delivered outside the scope

requirements.full_sentence:
Principles for ensuring reasonableness in fixing and communicating
Service Charges:
(1) For basic services to individuals, a UCB shall levy charges at the rates that
are lower than the rates applied when the same services are given to non-
individuals.
requirements.object: rates that are lower than the rates applied when the same services are given to non- individuals

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) For basic services rendered to special category of individuals (such as
individuals in rural areas, pensioners and senior citizens), a UCB shall levy
charges on more liberal terms than the terms on which the charges are
levied to other individuals.
requirements.object: liberal terms than the terms on which the charges are levied to other individuals

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) For the basic services rendered to individuals, a UCB shall levy charges
only if the charges are just and supported by reason.
requirements.object: the charges are just and supported by reason

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) For the basic services to individuals, a UCB shall levy services charges ad-
valorem only to cover any incremental cost and subject to a cap.
requirements.object: valorem only to cover any incremental cost and subject to a cap

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A UCB shall provide to the individual customers upfront and in a timely
manner, complete information on the charges applicable to all basic
services.
requirements.object: customers upfront and in a timely manner, complete information on the charges applicable to all basic services

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) A UCB shall provide advance information to the individual customers about
the proposed changes in the service charges.
requirements.object: the individual customers about the proposed changes in the service charges

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) A UCB shall collect for services given to individuals only such charges
which have been notified to the customer.
requirements.object: to individuals only such charges which have been notified to the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) A UCB shall inform the customers in an appropriate manner recovery of
service charges from the account or the transaction.
requirements.object: an appropriate manner recovery of service charges from the account or the transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) A UCB shall without fail inform the customers in all cases when a
transaction initiated by the UCB itself results in or is likely to lead to a
shortfall in the minimum balance required to be maintained.
requirements.object: customers in all cases when a transaction initiated by the UCB itself results in or is likely to lead to a shortfall in the mi

requirements.full_sentence:
The following
instructions shall be followed in this regard:
(1) Disclosure of Service Charges:
<image>
requirements.object: regard: (1) Disclosure of Service Charges: <image>

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A UCB shall communicate the service charges to new customers at the
time of beginning of the relationship.
requirements.object: to new customers at the time of beginning of the relationship

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Service charges shall be displayed in the notice board at the branch so
as to disseminate information to the customers / public, in addition to
display on the website, as per extant instructions of the Reserve Bank
requirements.object: notice board at the branch so as to disseminate information to the customers / public, in addition to display on the website, as p

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) A UCB shall also put in place appropriate methods for communicating
the service charges to customers of different profiles.
requirements.object: appropriate methods for communicating the service charges to customers of different profiles

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) An UCB shall take steps to ensure that any change in the service
charges is effected only with prior notification to the customers of at least
30 days.
requirements.object: that any change in the service charges is effected only with prior notification to the customers of at least 30 days

conditions: if not accepted
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A UCB shall provide an option to the customer to accept the change and
if not accepted, to exit from the relationship with the bank within the
above 30 days without any cost.
requirements.object: the customer to accept the change and if not accepted, to exit from the relationship with the bank within the above 30 days witho

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) A UCB may consider the option of advertising the changes in service
charges in newspapers apart from including the information regarding
the changes in any communication sent to the customer.
requirements.object: advertising the changes in service charges in newspapers apart from including the information regarding the changes in any comm

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) A UCB shall prominently display in the notice board as well as the
website all the changes in service charges effected in the preceding 30
days.
requirements.object: notice board as well as the website all the changes in service charges effected in the preceding 30 days

requirements.full_sentence:
Financial Education: A UCB shall disclose full-fledged information on its products
and their implications to the customers so that the customers can make an informed
judgment about their choice of products.
requirements.object: its products and their implications to the customers so that the customers can make an informed judgment about th

requirements.full_sentence:
A scheduled UCB shall place the details of service charges and fees on the
homepage of its website at a prominent place under the title of 'Service Charges and
Fees' so as to facilitate easy access to its customers.
requirements.object: service charges and fees on the homepage of its website at a prominent place under the title of 'Service Charges and Fees' so as

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall display important aspects or indicators on a notice board, covering
areas such as customer service information, service charges, grievance redressal.
requirements.object: indicators on a notice board, covering areas such as customer service information, service charges, grievance redressal

requirements.full_sentence: The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis.
requirements.object: periodical basis

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall display information relating to interest rates and service charges in
its premises as well as post it on its website, to enable the customer to obtain the
desired information at a glance.
requirements.object: interest rates and service charges in its premises as well as post it on its website, to enable the customer to obtain

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB, shall also display at its offices / branches the service charges
relating to the following services in the local language:
(1) Services rendered free of charge
(2) Others
requirements.object: offices / branches the service charges relating to the following services in the local language: (1) Services rendered free of cha

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall adhere to the guidelines and procedures for opening and operating
deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening accounts mainly
to use them as conduit for fraudulently encashing payment instruments.
requirements.object: and procedures for opening and operating deposit accounts to safeguard against unscrupulous persons opening accounts mainly t

requirements.full_sentence:
However, in
view of receipt of continuous complaints of fraudulent encashment by unscrupulous
persons opening deposit accounts in the name/s similar to already established entities,
resulting in erroneous and unauthorised debit of drawers' accounts, a UCB shall
<image>
remain vigilant to prevent such lapses and issue necessary instructions to the
branches / staff.
requirements.object: prevent such lapses and issue necessary instructions to the branches / staff

conditions: where a UCB is at fault
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of fraudulent encashment of third-party instruments by unscrupulous
persons, by opening deposit accounts in the name/s similar to already established
concern/s resulting in erroneous and unwanted debit of drawers' accounts:
(1) In cases where a UCB is at fault, it shall compensate the customers without
demur;
requirements.object: demur

conditions: where neither the UCB is at fault nor the customer is at fault
where in the system
requirements.full_sentence:
and
(2) In cases where neither the UCB is at fault nor the customer is at fault, but the
fault lies elsewhere in the system, then also the UCB shall compensate the
customer (up to a limit) as part of a Board approved customer relations policy.
requirements.object: to a limit) as part of a Board approved customer relations policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The systems and procedures in UCBs shall be designed to make customers feel
safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions.
requirements.object: customers feel safe about carrying out electronic banking transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
To achieve this, a UCB shall
put in place:
(1) appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of
electronic banking transactions carried out by customers;
requirements.object: appropriate systems and procedures to ensure safety and security of electronic banking transactions carried out by customers

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ask its customers to mandatorily register for SMS alerts and wherever
available register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactions.
requirements.object: mandatorily register for SMS alerts and wherever available register for e-mail alerts, for electronic banking transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
The SMS alerts
shall mandatorily be sent to the customers, while email alerts may be sent, wherever
registered.
requirements.object: the customers, while email alerts may be sent

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be advised to notify their UCB of any unauthorised
electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the occurrence of such transaction
and informed that the longer the time taken to notify the UCB, the higher will be the
risk of loss to the UCB / customer.
requirements.object: their UCB of any unauthorised electronic banking transaction at the earliest after the occurrence of such transaction and informe

requirements.full_sentence:
To facilitate this, a UCB shall provide customers
with 24x7 access through multiple channels (at a minimum, via website, phone
banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a dedicated toll-free helpline, reporting to home branch,
etc.) for reporting unauthorised transactions that have taken place and/ or loss or theft
of payment instrument such as card, etc.
requirements.object: access through multiple channels (at a minimum, via website, phone banking, SMS, e-mail, IVR, a dedicated toll-free helpli

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also enable customers to
instantly respond by "Reply" to the SMS and e-mail alerts and the customers shall not
be required to search for a web page or an e-mail address to notify the objection, if
any.
requirements.object: for a web page or an e-mail address to notify the objection

requirements.full_sentence:
As an alternative, the bank shall prove and alternate number in the transaction
alert SMS itself, to which the customer can immediately send a reply.
requirements.object: in the transaction alert SMS itself, to which the customer can immediately send a reply

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a direct
link for lodging the complaints, with specific option to report unauthorised electronic
transactions shall be provided by UCBs on home page of their website.

requirements.full_sentence:
The loss/ fraud
reporting system shall also ensure that immediate response (including auto response)
is sent to the customers acknowledging the complaint along with the registered
complaint number.
requirements.object: response (including auto response) is sent to the customers acknowledging the complaint along with the registered complaint

requirements.full_sentence:
The communication systems used by UCBs to send alerts and
receive their responses thereto shall record the time and date of delivery of the
message and receipt of customer's response, if any, to them.
requirements.object: date of delivery of the message and receipt of customer's response

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be important
in determining the extent of a customer's liability.
requirements.object: the extent of a customer's liability

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not offer facility of
electronic transactions, other than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do not
<image>
provide mobile numbers to it.
requirements.object: transactions, other than ATM cash withdrawals, to customers who do not <image> provide mobile numbers to it

requirements.full_sentence:
On receipt of report of an unauthorised transaction from
the customer, a UCB shall take immediate steps to prevent further unauthorised
transactions in the account.
requirements.object: prevent further unauthorised transactions in the account

requirements.full_sentence:
A customer's entitlement to zero liability shall arise where the unauthorised
transaction occurs in the following events:
(1) Contributory fraud/ negligence/ deficiency on the part of the UCB (irrespective
of whether the transaction is reported by the customer or not).
requirements.object: transaction occurs in the following events: (1) Contributory fraud/ negligence/ deficiency on the part of the UCB (irresp

conditions: where the loss is due to negligence by a customer
requirements.full_sentence:
A customer shall be liable for the loss occurring due to unauthorised transactions
in the following cases:
(1) In cases where the loss is due to negligence by a customer, such as where
he/ she has shared the payment credentials, the customer will bear the entire loss
until he/ she reports the unauthorised transaction to the UCB.
requirements.object: loss occurring due to unauthorised transactions in the following cases: (1) In cases where the loss is due to negligence by a custom

requirements.full_sentence:
Any loss occurring
after the reporting of the unauthorised transaction shall be borne by the UCB.
requirements.object: UCB

conditions:
where the responsibility for the unauthorised electronic banking
transaction lies neither with the UCB nor with the customer
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In cases where the responsibility for the unauthorised electronic banking
transaction lies neither with the UCB nor with the customer, but lies elsewhere in
the system and the customer notifies the UCB of such a transaction within four to
seven working days of receiving a communication of the transaction, the per
transaction liability of the customer shall be limited to the transaction value or the
amount mentioned in Table 2, whichever is lower.
requirements.object: transaction value or the amount mentioned in Table 2, whichever is lower

conditions: if the delay in reporting is beyond seven working days
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if the delay in reporting is beyond seven working days, the customer
liability shall be determined as per the UCB's Board approved policy.
requirements.object: the UCB's Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
provide the details of their policy regarding customers' liability formulated in pursuance
of these directions at the time of opening the accounts.
requirements.object: their policy regarding customers' liability formulated in pursuance of these directions at the time of opening the accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also display their
approved policy in public domain for wider dissemination.
requirements.object: policy in public domain for wider dissemination

requirements.full_sentence:
The existing customers shall
also be individually informed about a UCB's policy.
requirements.object: about a UCB's policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The number of working days mentioned in Table 2 shall be counted as per the
working schedule of the home branch of the customer excluding the date of receiving
the communication.
requirements.object: the working schedule of the home branch of the customer excluding the date of receiving the communication

requirements.timeline: within 10 working days from the date of such notification by the customer
requirements.full_sentence:
On being notified by the customer, the UCB shall credit (shadow reversal) the
amount involved in the unauthorised electronic transaction to the customer's account
<image>
within 10 working days from the date of such notification by the customer (without
waiting for settlement of insurance claim, if any).
requirements.object: amount involved in the unauthorised electronic transaction to the customer's account <image> within 10 working days from the date of such notification by the customer (without waiting for settlement of insurance claim

requirements.full_sentence:
The credit shall be value dated to be
as of the date of unauthorised transaction.
requirements.object: be as of the date of unauthorised transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB may also at its discretion decide
to waive off any customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking
transactions even in cases of customer negligence.
requirements.object: decide to waive off any customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking transactions even in cases of customer ne

conditions:
if any, established and
the customer is compensated as per provisions of paragraphs 56 to 61 above
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the UCB shall ensure that:
(1) a complaint is resolved and liability of the customer, if any, established and
the customer is compensated as per provisions of paragraphs 56 to 61 above,
within such time as may be specified in the UCB's Board approved policy, but not
exceeding 90 days from the date of receipt of the complaint;
requirements.object: complaint is resolved and liability of the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall formulate / revise its customer relations policy with approval of its
Board, which shall clearly define the rights and obligations of customers in case of
unauthorized transactions in specified scenarios i.e.
requirements.object: customer relations policy with approval of its Board, which shall clearly define the rights and obligations of customers in cas

conditions: in case of unauthorized electronic banking transactions
requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also include mechanism of creating customer
awareness on the risks and responsibilities involved in electronic banking transactions,
and customer liability in case of unauthorized electronic banking transactions,
procedure for reporting unauthorized electronic banking transactions and
acknowledgement of complaints.
requirements.object: creating customer awareness on the risks and responsibilities involved in electronic banking transactions, and customer liab

requirements.full_sentence:
It should also provide for a robust grievance
redressal structure as per extant instructions, escalation matrix, clear timelines for
resolution of customer complaints, and compensation keeping in view the instructions
contained in paragraph 62 above.
requirements.object: robust grievance redressal structure as per extant instructions, escalation matrix, clear timelines for resolution of customer comp

requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions contained in this section shall be
incorporated in the policy, and the policy should be prominently displayed at branches.
requirements.object: policy, and the policy should be prominently displayed at branches

requirements.full_sentence:
The burden of proving customer liability in case of unauthorised electronic banking
transactions shall lie on the UCB.

A UCB shall put in place a suitable mechanism and structure for the reporting of
the customer liability cases to the Board or one of its Committees.
requirements.object: suitable mechanism and structure for the reporting of the customer liability cases to the Board or one of its Committees

requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting shall,
inter alia, include volume / number of cases and the aggregate value involved and
distribution across various categories of cases viz., card present transactions, card not
present transactions, internet banking, mobile banking, ATM transactions, etc.
requirements.object: volume / number of cases and the aggregate value involved and distribution across various categories of cases viz

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Board in each UCB shall periodically review the unauthorised electronic banking
transactions reported by customers or otherwise, as also the action taken thereon, the
functioning of the grievance redress mechanism and take appropriate measures to
improve the systems and procedures.
requirements.object: electronic banking transactions reported by customers or otherwise, as also the action taken thereon, the functio

requirements.full_sentence:
All such transactions shall be reviewed by the
UCB's internal auditors.
requirements.object: UCB's internal auditors

requirements.full_sentence:
Every UCB shall
offer a BSBD account which shall be considered a normal banking service available
to all.
requirements.object: which shall be considered a normal banking service available to all

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall offer the following basic minimum facilities in a BSBD account, free
of charge, without any requirement of minimum balance to be maintained in such an
account.
requirements.object: minimum facilities in a BSBD account, free of charge, without any requirement of minimum balance to be maintained in such an

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, no charges shall be levied towards
annual fee, either at the time of issuance or renewal.
requirements.object: fee, either at the time of issuance or renewal

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, issuance of a
continuation passbook, on exhaustion of the pages in the previous passbook,
shall not attract any charge.

Digital
payment transactions excluding ATM transactions, i.e., Point of Sale transfers,
NEFT, RTGS, UPI, IMPS, etc., shall not be counted as withdrawals for this
purpose.
requirements.object: for this purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
The charges on digital payment transactions shall be in accordance
with guidelines issued by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems,
Reserve Bank / National Payments Corporation of India / Government of India,
as applicable.
requirements.object: guidelines issued by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank / National Payments Corporation of India / Gover

requirements.full_sentence:
The facilities of ATM / ATM-cum-Debit card or internet / mobile banking or cheque
book shall be offered to a customer provided he / she requests for the same, whether
at the time of opening the account or subsequently.
requirements.object: customer provided he / she requests for the same, whether at the time of opening the account or subsequently

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not insist that a
customer necessarily avails these facilities while opening and/ or operating the BSBD
account.
requirements.object: necessarily avails these facilities while opening and/ or operating the BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of existing BSBD accounts, a UCB shall extend the newly introduced
free facilities at clause (5) to (7) of paragraph 66 above upon receipt of a request from
the customer.
requirements.object: free facilities at clause (5) to (7) of paragraph 66 above upon receipt of a request from the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall facilitate existing BSBD account holders to submit such
requests through physical as well as digital channels.
requirements.object: holders to submit such requests through physical as well as digital channels

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may provide additional facilities beyond the above minimum in a BSBD
account, with or without charges, in a non-discretionary and non-discriminatory
manner with transparent disclosure to the customer.
requirements.object: the above minimum in a BSBD account, with or without charges, in a non-discretionary and non-discriminatory manne

requirements.full_sentence:
However, while doing so, the
UCB shall not require the customer to maintain a minimum balance in the BSBD
account.
requirements.object: maintain a minimum balance in the BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
The availment of such additional facilities shall be at the option of the
customer.
requirements.object: of the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Opening and operation of BSBD accounts shall be subject to the instructions on
Know Your Customer / Anti Money Laundering issued by the Reserve Bank vide
'Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025', as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: instructions on Know Your Customer / Anti Money Laundering issued by the Reserve Bank vide 'Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operativ

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, BSBD accounts opened by
or operated on behalf of minors shall be subject to the instructions contained in
paragraphs 117 to 122 below of these Directions.
requirements.object: instructions contained in paragraphs 117 to 122 below of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, while opening a BSBD account, shall not impose any requirement of an
initial minimum deposit.
requirements.object: an initial minimum deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
A customer may convert his / her existing savings bank account to a BSBD
account.
requirements.object: existing savings bank account to a BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall convert the existing savings bank account to BSBD account
within seven days of receipt of request in writing from the customer for such
conversion.
requirements.object: bank account to BSBD account within seven days of receipt of request in writing from the customer for such conversion

requirements.full_sentence:
Such an option shall also be provided to customers through digital
channels.
requirements.object: customers through digital channels

requirements.full_sentence:
The holder of a BSBD account shall not be eligible to open another BSBD account
in the same UCB or any other bank.
requirements.object: another BSBD account in the same UCB or any other bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, before opening a new BSBD account
or converting an existing savings bank account to a BSBD account, the UCB shall
<image>
obtain a declaration from the customer that he / she does not have a BSBD account
in any bank.
requirements.object: from the customer that he / she does not have a BSBD account in any bank

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall publicise the availability of BSBD account and its features to
customers.
requirements.object: BSBD account and its features to customers

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall also convey the differences between BSBD account and
various savings bank account variants offered by it when a customer approaches it to
open a deposit account.
requirements.object: between BSBD account and various savings bank account variants offered by it when a customer approaches it to open a depos

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall take necessary steps to provide all existing ATMs / future ATMs with
ramps so that wheelchair users / persons with disabilities can easily access them.
requirements.object: provide all existing ATMs / future ATMs with ramps so that wheelchair users / persons with disabilities can easily access them

requirements.full_sentence:
Care may also be taken to make arrangements in such a way that the height of the
ATMs do not create an impediment in their use by wheelchair users.
requirements.object: make arrangements in such a way that the height of the ATMs do not create an impediment in their use by wheelchair users

conditions: where it is impracticable to provide such ramp facilities
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in cases
where it is impracticable to provide such ramp facilities, whether permanently fixed to
earth or otherwise, this requirement may be dispensed with, for reasons recorded and
displayed in branches or ATMs concerned.
requirements.object: reasons recorded and displayed in branches or ATMs concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also take appropriate steps, including providing of ramps at the
entrance of its branches, wherever feasible, so that the persons with disabilities /
wheelchair users can enter its branches and conduct business without difficulty.
requirements.object: including providing of ramps at the entrance of its branches

requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall report the progress made in this regard periodically to their respective
Customer Service Committee of the Board and ensure compliance.
requirements.object: in this regard periodically to their respective Customer Service Committee of the Board and ensure compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that all the banking facilities such as cheque book facility
including third party cheques, ATM facility, Net banking facility, locker facility, retail
loans, credit cards etc.
requirements.object: banking facilities such as cheque book facility including third party cheques, ATM facility, Net banking facility, locker facility

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also advise its branches to render all possible
assistance to the visually challenged for availing the various banking facilities.
requirements.object: to render all possible assistance to the visually challenged for availing the various banking facilities

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall ensure all ATMs as talking ATMs with Braille keypads.
requirements.object: talking ATMs with Braille keypads

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also provide magnifying glasses in all its branches for the use of
persons with low vision, wherever they require, for carrying out banking transactions
with ease.
requirements.object: in all its branches for the use of persons with low vision

requirements.full_sentence:
The branches of a UCB shall display at a prominent place notice about the
<image>
availability of magnifying glasses and other facilities available for persons with
disabilities.
requirements.object: place notice about the <image> availability of magnifying glasses and other facilities available for persons with disabilities

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to facilitate old / sick / incapacitated bank customers to operate their bank
accounts, procedure as laid down below shall be followed.

A UCB may follow the procedure as under:
(1) Wherever thumb or toe impression of the sick / old / incapacitated account holder
is obtained, it should be identified by two independent witnesses known to the UCB,
one of whom should be a responsible UCB official.
requirements.object: under: (1) Wherever thumb or toe impression of the sick / old / incapacitated account holder is obtained, it should be identif

conditions:
Where the customer cannot even put his / her thumb impression and also would
not be able to be physically present in the UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Where the customer cannot even put his / her thumb impression and also would
not be able to be physically present in the UCB, a mark obtained on the
cheque/withdrawal form which should be identified by two independent witnesses,
one of whom should be a responsible UCB official.
requirements.object: independent witnesses, one of whom should be a responsible UCB official

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the customer shall be asked to indicate to a UCB as to who would
withdraw the amount from the UCB on the basis of cheque/withdrawal form as
obtained above and that person should be identified by two independent witnesses.
requirements.object: to a UCB as to who would withdraw the amount from the UCB on the basis of cheque/withdrawal form as obtained above and that perso

requirements.full_sentence:
The person who would be actually drawing the money from the UCB should be asked
to furnish his signature to the UCB.
requirements.object: his signature to the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, according to an opinion obtained by the Indian Banks' Association
from their consultant on the question of opening of a bank account of a person who
had lost both his hands and could not sign the cheque/withdrawal form, there must be
physical contact between the person who is to sign and the signature or the mark put
on the document.
requirements.object: the person who is to sign and the signature or the mark put on the document

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, in the case of the person who has lost both his hands,
the signature can be by means of a mark.

A UCB
shall undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance with the above Supreme
Court Order, as applicable.
requirements.object: ensure compliance with the above Supreme Court Order, as applicable

requirements.full_sentence:
The following guidelines shall be applicable for the purpose of opening / operating
bank accounts of the above persons:
(1) The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental
Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 provides a law relating to certain
specified disabilities.
requirements.object: purpose of opening / operating bank accounts of the above persons: (1) The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Ce

requirements.full_sentence:
This Act
empowers a Local Level Committee to appoint a guardian, to a person with
disabilities, who shall have the care of the person and property of the disabled
person.
requirements.object: the person and property of the disabled person

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A UCB is advised to take note of the legal position stated above and may rely on
and be guided by the orders / certificates issued by the competent authority, under
the respective Acts, appointing guardians / managers for the purposes of
opening/operating bank accounts.
requirements.object: guided by the orders / certificates issued by the competent authority, under the respective Acts, appointing guardians / managers for t

conditions: In case of doubt
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of doubt, care may be taken to obtain
proper legal advice.
requirements.object: proper legal advice

conditions:
where they are convinced on their
own or based on documentary evidence available
requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
<image>
not insist on guardianship certificate from all mentally ill persons and seek
appointment of a guardian only in such cases where they are convinced on their
own or based on documentary evidence available, that the concerned person is
mentally ill and is not able to enter into a valid and legally binding contract.
requirements.object: guardianship certificate from all mentally ill persons and seek appointment of a guardian only in such cases where they are conv

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that its branches give proper guidance to their customers so
that the guardians / managers of the disabled persons do not face any difficulties in
this regard.
requirements.object: give proper guidance to their customers so that the guardians / managers of the disabled persons do not face any difficulties

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall include 'third gender' in all forms/applications etc.
requirements.object: all forms/applications etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall make available to the customers brochures / pamphlets in regional
language / Hindi / English giving details of various schemes available and terms and
conditions thereof.
requirements.object: customers brochures / pamphlets in regional language / Hindi / English giving details of various schemes available and terms and

requirements.full_sentence:
Such brochures may also contain, among others, do's and don'ts
for smooth handling of day-to-day banking transactions, e.g, updation of passbooks
preferably in the leaner weeks of the month, say, third / fourth week, advantages of
maintaining joint accounts and nomination, keeping the term deposit receipts in safe
custody with the UCB with instructions for disposal of maturity, etc.
requirements.object: do's and don'ts for smooth handling of day-to-day banking transactions, e

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall provide assistance / guidance to customers in the area of investment
of funds in the various deposit schemes vis-à-vis the requirement of the customers.
requirements.object: to customers in the area of investment of funds in the various deposit schemes vis-à-vis the requirement of the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may operate their calamity affected branches from temporary premises
under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
requirements.object: branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
For continuing the temporary
premise beyond 30 days, banks may obtain specific approval from the respective
Regional Office of RBI.
requirements.object: the respective Regional Office of RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also make arrangements to render banking
3 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
requirements.object: render banking 3 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Responsible

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall take immediate action for restoration of ATM services at the earliest.
requirements.object: restoration of ATM services at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
During the period, it shall provide alternative arrangements to address the immediate
cash requirements of the affected areas.
requirements.object: address the immediate cash requirements of the affected areas

requirements.full_sentence:
Persons displaced or adversely affected by a calamity may not have access to
their identification and personal records.
requirements.object: identification and personal records

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, small accounts as stipulated
in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025, may be opened by banks.

conditions:
where a natural
calamity has been declared
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank at its discretion, may provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction
of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a natural
calamity has been declared, for a period not exceeding one year.]
<image>
requirements.object: as waiver / reduction of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a natural calamity has been

requirements.full_sentence:
The duplicate draft amounting to ₹5,000 or less, may be issued on the basis of
adequate indemnity and without obtaining Non-Payment Advice (NPA) from the
drawee branch.
requirements.object: basis of adequate indemnity and without obtaining Non-Payment Advice (NPA) from the drawee branch

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that a duplicate demand draft is issued within a fortnight from
the receipt of such requests.
requirements.object: demand draft is issued within a fortnight from the receipt of such requests

requirements.full_sentence:
For delay in issuing duplicate demand draft beyond the
above stipulated period, it shall pay interest at rate applicable for term deposit of
corresponding maturity in order to compensate the customer for such delay.
requirements.object: applicable for term deposit of corresponding maturity in order to compensate the customer for such delay

requirements.full_sentence:
Senior Officials, while visiting branches, shall make
it a point to check implementation of the above instructions.
requirements.object: to check implementation of the above instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
The cheque collection policy should be integrated with the deposit policy
formulated by a UCB in line with the model deposit policy of Indian Banks' Association
or Association of which it is a member.
requirements.object: deposit policy formulated by a UCB in line with the model deposit policy of Indian Banks' Association or Association of which i

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should clearly lay down the liability of a UCB by way of interest
payments due to delays for non-compliance with the standards set by the UCB itself.
requirements.object: liability of a UCB by way of interest payments due to delays for non-compliance with the standards set by the UCB itself

conditions: where necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
Compensation by way of interest payment, where necessary, should be made
without any claim from the customer.
requirements.object: claim from the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Adequate care may be taken to ensure that the interests of the small depositors
are fully protected.
requirements.object: that the interests of the small depositors are fully protected

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should be placed before the Board of the UCB and the Board's specific
approval should be obtained on the reasonableness of the policy and the compliance
with the spirit of our guidelines.
requirements.object: Board of the UCB and the Board's specific approval should be obtained on the reasonableness of the policy and the compliance with

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall accept cheques bearing a date as per National Calendar (Saka
Samvat) for payment, if otherwise found in order.
requirements.object: date as per National Calendar (Saka Samvat) for payment

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the Gregorian calendar
date corresponding to the National Saka calendar shall be ascertained to avoid
payment of stale cheques.
requirements.object: payment of stale cheques

requirements.full_sentence:
Fresh cheque books should be issued only against production of duly signed
requisition slips from previous cheque book issued to the party.
requirements.object: production of duly signed requisition slips from previous cheque book issued to the party

conditions:
In case the cheque
book is issued against a requisition letter
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the cheque
book is issued against a requisition letter, the drawer should be asked to come
personally to the UCB or cheque book should be sent to him under registered post
directly without being delivered to the bearer.
requirements.object: personally to the UCB or cheque book should be sent to him under registered post directly without being delivered to the bearer

requirements.full_sentence:
Loose cheques shall be issued to
account holder only when they come personally with a requisition letter and on
production of passbooks.
requirements.object: holder only when they come personally with a requisition letter and on production of passbooks

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall take due care to ensure that any unusually large demand by any
account holder for cheque books is looked into carefully to make sure that the cheque
leaves are needed for genuine short-term business requirements.
requirements.object: ensure that any unusually large demand by any account holder for cheque books is looked into carefully to make sure that the cheque l

requirements.full_sentence:
Banking facilities
shall not be allowed to be misused by any constituent for mobilising resources by
giving people a false sense of assurance through issue of such long duration post-
dated cheques.
requirements.object: misused by any constituent for mobilising resources by giving people a false sense of assurance through issue of such long duration p

requirements.full_sentence:
While the cheque drop facility may be made available to the customers, the facility
for acknowledgement of cheques at the regular collection counters shall not be denied
to them.

No branch shall refuse to give an acknowledgement on cheques being
tendered by customers at its counters.
requirements.object: acknowledgement on cheques being tendered by customers at its counters

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, customers shall be made aware of
both options available to them i.e., dropping cheques in the drop box or tendering them
at the counters so that they can take an informed decision in this regard.
requirements.object: both options available to them i

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, a
UCB shall display on the Cheque Drop-Box itself that "Customers can also tender the
cheques at the counter and obtain acknowledgement on the pay-in-slips".
requirements.object: Drop-Box itself that "Customers can also tender the cheques at the counter and obtain acknowledgement on the pay-in-slips"

requirements.full_sentence:
The above
message shall be displayed in English, Hindi and the concerned regional language of
the State.
requirements.object: Hindi and the concerned regional language of the State

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that cheques / drafts issued by clients containing fractions
of a Rupee are not rejected or dishonoured by it.
requirements.object: drafts issued by clients containing fractions of a Rupee are not rejected or dishonoured by it

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall review the practice being
followed by it in this regard and take necessary steps, including through issue of
internal circulars, etc., to ensure that the concerned staff are well versed with these
instructions so that the general public does not suffer.
requirements.object: followed by it in this regard and take necessary steps, including through issue of internal circulars, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also ensure that
appropriate action is taken against members of its staff who are found to have refused
to accept cheques / drafts containing fractions of a Rupee.
requirements.object: action is taken against members of its staff who are found to have refused to accept cheques / drafts containing fraction

requirements.full_sentence:
An UCB shall be guided by Reserve bank's instructions on KYC / AML for
opening and operation of accounts as prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban
Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: bank's instructions on KYC / AML for opening and operation of accounts as prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-opera

requirements.full_sentence:
While levying charges for non-maintenance of minimum balance in savings
bank account, a UCB shall be subject to the following guidelines:
(1) In the event of a default in maintenance of minimum balance / average minimum
balance as agreed to between a UCB and customer, the UCB should notify the
customer clearly by SMS / email / letter etc., that in the event of the minimum
balance not being restored in the account within a month from the date of notice,
penal charges will be applicable.
requirements.object: following guidelines: (1) In the event of a default in maintenance of minimum balance / average minimum balance as agreed to between

conditions: In case the minimum balance is not restored within a reasonable period
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case the minimum balance is not restored within a reasonable period, which
shall not be less than one month from the date of notice of shortfall, penal
charges may be recovered under intimation to the account holder.
requirements.object: month from the date of notice of shortfall, penal charges may be recovered under intimation to the account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The policy on penal charges to be so levied shall be decided with the approval
of the Board of the UCB.
requirements.object: approval of the Board of the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The penal charges should be directly proportionate to the extent of shortfall
observed.
requirements.object: the extent of shortfall observed

requirements.full_sentence:
In other words, the charges should be a fixed percentage levied on
the amount of difference between the actual balance maintained and the
minimum balance as agreed upon at the time of opening of account.
requirements.object: levied on the amount of difference between the actual balance maintained and the minimum balance as agreed upon at the time of o

requirements.full_sentence:
A suitable
slab structure for recovery of charges may be finalized.

(5) It should be ensured that such penal charges are reasonable and not out of line
with the average cost of providing the services.
requirements.object: penal charges are reasonable and not out of line with the average cost of providing the services

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) It should be ensured that the balance in the savings account does not turn into
negative balance solely on account of levy of charges for non-maintenance of
minimum balance.
requirements.object: balance in the savings account does not turn into negative balance solely on account of levy of charges for non-maintenance of min

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall invariably offer passbook facility to all its savings bank account
holders (individuals).
requirements.object: to all its savings bank account holders (individuals)

requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of providing such passbooks should not be recovered
from the customers.
requirements.object: customers

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that full address, telephone number, MICR Code and IFSC
of the branch is invariably mentioned in the Passbook / Statement of Accounts issued
to account holders.
requirements.object: telephone number, MICR Code and IFSC of the branch is invariably mentioned in the Passbook / Statement of Accounts issued to

The bank shall devise controls to ensure that the passbooks are updated on

requirements.object: that the passbooks are updated on an ongoing basis, and complete and correct particulars are written in a legible hand

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may take the following steps to provide customer satisfaction in these
areas:
(1) Customer education drives may be launched to bring home the advantages of
getting the passbooks updated regularly / periodically.
requirements.object: to provide customer satisfaction in these areas: (1) Customer education drives may be launched to bring home the advantages o

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Employees may be exhorted to attach importance to this area to provide
customer satisfaction.
requirements.object: importance to this area to provide customer satisfaction

requirements.full_sentence: As a rule, passbooks shall be updated immediately on submission.
requirements.object: submission

requirements.full_sentence:
Constant attention shall be given to ensure entry of correct and legible
particulars in the pass books and statement of accounts.
requirements.object: entry of correct and legible particulars in the pass books and statement of accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall avoid inscrutable
entries in passbooks / statement of accounts and ensure that brief, intelligible
particulars are invariably entered in passbooks / statement of account.
requirements.object: passbooks / statement of accounts and ensure that brief, intelligible particulars are invariably entered in passbooks / s

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall at a minimum provide the relevant details in respect of entries in
the accounts as illustrated (the list is indicative and not exhaustive) below:
Table 4
Debit entries a.
requirements.object: the relevant details in respect of entries in the accounts as illustrated (the list is indicative and not exhaustive) below: Tabl
