requirements.full_sentence:
Payment to third parties (i) Name of the payee
Note: In case of single debit in account with multiple credits, the payee name/ account number/ branch/ bank shall not be recorded.

A UCB shall also incorporate information about 'deposit insurance cover' along
with the limit of coverage, subject to change from time to time, upfront in the
passbooks.
requirements.object: 'deposit insurance cover' along with the limit of coverage

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that its term deposit schemes are made known to the
customers through proper publicity and advice.
requirements.object: deposit schemes are made known to the customers through proper publicity and advice

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall also be informed
specifically of the provision of monthly interest on term deposits at a discounted rate
and the facility of safe custody of term deposit receipts.
requirements.object: of the provision of monthly interest on term deposits at a discounted rate and the facility of safe custody of term depo

requirements.full_sentence:
Term deposit application forms may be so devised as to contain a direction for
disposal of deposits on maturity.
requirements.object: to contain a direction for disposal of deposits on maturity

conditions:
where the customer does not indicate
the course of action by a UCB on maturity of deposits
requirements.full_sentence:
In those cases where the customer does not indicate
the course of action by a UCB on maturity of deposits, it shall as a rule send intimation
of impending due date of the deposit well in advance.
requirements.object: intimation of impending due date of the deposit well in advance

conditions:
If term deposit accounts are opened with operating instructions 'Either or
Survivor'
requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall adhere to the following instructions relating to operations in term
deposit accounts:
(1) If term deposit accounts are opened with operating instructions 'Either or
Survivor', the signatures of both the depositors need not be obtained for payment
of the amount of the deposits on maturity.
requirements.object: instructions relating to operations in term deposit accounts: (1) If term deposit accounts are opened with operating instructi

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the signatures of both the
depositors shall be obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity.
requirements.object: the deposit is to be paid before maturity

requirements.full_sentence:
If
the operating instruction is 'Either or Survivor' and one of the depositors is
deceased before the maturity, no pre-payment of the term deposit may be
allowed without the concurrence of the legal heirs of the deceased joint holder.
requirements.object: concurrence of the legal heirs of the deceased joint holder

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the signature of both the depositors shall be obtained, in case
the deposit is to be paid before maturity.
requirements.object: the deposit is to be paid before maturity

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) If the joint depositors prefer to allow premature withdrawals of term deposits also
in accordance with the mandate of 'Either or Survivor' or 'Former or Survivor', as
the case may be, it would be open to banks to do so, provided they have taken
a specific joint mandate from the depositors for the said purpose.
requirements.object: open to banks to do so

conditions:
where a term deposit account(s) of a depositor is frozen by a UCB on
the order of law enforcement authorities
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a term deposit account(s) of a depositor is frozen by a UCB on
the order of law enforcement authorities, the UCB shall obtain a request letter from the
depositor on maturity for renewal of the deposit.
requirements.object: from the depositor on maturity for renewal of the deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
The depositor shall be given an option
to choose the term for renewal of the deposit.
requirements.object: to choose the term for renewal of the deposit

conditions:
In case the depositor does not exercise
the option of choosing the term for renewal
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the depositor does not exercise
the option of choosing the term for renewal, the UCB shall renew the deposit for a term
equal to the original term.
requirements.object: a term equal to the original term

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall give an
acknowledgment at the time of receipt of such declaration.
requirements.object: the time of receipt of such declaration

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall put in place a system that to provide TDS Certificate in Form 16A
to its customers from whose deposit accounts income tax has been deducted at
source, within the timeframe prescribed under the Income Tax Rules.
requirements.object: system that to provide TDS Certificate in Form 16A to its customers from whose deposit accounts income tax has been deducted at source,

requirements.full_sentence:
Minors of any age may be allowed to open and operate savings and term
deposit accounts through his/ her natural or legal guardian.
requirements.object: and operate savings and term deposit accounts through his/ her natural or legal guardian

requirements.full_sentence:
They may also be allowed
<image>
to open such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on
December 29, 1976, whose contents are reproduced below:
It has been brought to our notice that considerable difficulty is being experienced by
women customers in opening bank accounts in the names of minors, with mothers as
their guardians.
requirements.object: to open such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on December 29, 1976, whose contents are reprodu

requirements.full_sentence:
Presumably, UCBs are reluctant to accept the mother as a guardian
of a minor, while father is alive in view of section 6 of the Hindu Minority and
Guardianship Act, 1956, which stipulates that the father alone should be deemed to
be the guardian in such case.
requirements.object: the guardian in such case

requirements.full_sentence:
To overcome this legal difficulty and to enable a UCB to
open freely such accounts in the name of minors under the guardianship of their
mothers, it has been suggested in some quarters that the above provisions should be
suitably amended.

While it is true that an amendment of the above Act may overcome
the difficulty in the case of Hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities
as minors belonging to Muslim, Christian, Parsi Communities would still be left out
unless the laws governing these communities are also likewise amended.
requirements.object: the case of Hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities as minors belonging to Muslim, Christian, Parsi Com

requirements.full_sentence:
We shall, therefore, be glad if you will kindly apprise all your branches of the position
as stated above and instruct them to allow minors' accounts (fixed and savings only)
with mothers as guardians to be opened, whenever such requests are received by
them, subject to the safeguards mentioned above.
requirements.object: if you will kindly apprise all your branches of the position as stated above and instruct them to allow minors' accounts (fixed and savings only) with mothers as guardians to be opened

conditions: if they so desire
requirements.full_sentence:
Minors above such an age limit not less than 10 years and up to such amount
and such terms as may be fixed by a UCB keeping in view its risk management policy,
may be allowed to open and operate savings / term deposit accounts independently,
if they so desire, and such terms shall be duly conveyed to the account holder.
requirements.object: the account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
On attaining the age of majority, fresh operating instructions and specimen
signature of the account holder shall be obtained and kept on record.
requirements.object: on record

conditions:
if the
account is operated by the guardian
requirements.full_sentence:
Moreover, if the
account is operated by the guardian, the balance shall be got confirmed.

A UCB shall
take advance action, including communicating these requirements to minor account
holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these requirements.
requirements.object: communicating these requirements to minor account holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that accounts of minors, whether operated independently
or through a guardian, are not allowed to be overdrawn and that these always remain
in credit balance.
requirements.object: minors, whether operated independently or through a guardian, are not allowed to be overdrawn and that these always remain in

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall perform customer due diligence for opening of deposit accounts of
minors and undertake ongoing due diligence, as per the provisions of Reserve Bank
of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: for opening of deposit accounts of minors and undertake ongoing due diligence, as per the provisions of Reserve Bank of

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall undertake at least an annual review in respect of accounts, where
there is no customer induced transactions for more than a year.
requirements.object: annual review in respect of accounts

conditions:
where there
is no explicit mandate to renew the term deposit
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where there
is no explicit mandate to renew the term deposit, a UCB shall review such accounts if
the customers have not withdrawn the proceeds after maturity or transferred these to
their savings/current account in order to prevent such deposits from becoming
unclaimed.
requirements.object: the customers have not withdrawn the proceeds after maturity or transferred these to their savings/current account in order to

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall inform the account/deposit holders in writing through letters
or email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered with the UCB) that
there has been no operation in their accounts/deposits in the last one year, as the
case may be.
requirements.object: in writing through letters or email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered with the UCB) that there

conditions: if no operations are carried out during the next one year and
requirements.full_sentence:
The alert messages shall invariably mention that the account would
become 'inoperative' if no operations are carried out during the next one year and, the
account holder would be required to submit KYC documents afresh for reactivating the
account in such case.
requirements.object: account would become 'inoperative' if no operations are carried out during the next one year and, the account holder would

conditions:
If the letters are returned undelivered or no response is received through
registered email
requirements.full_sentence:
If the letters are returned undelivered or no response is received through
registered email, a UCB shall immediately undertake an enquiry to find out the
whereabouts of account holder or his/her nominee/legal heirs in case the account
holder is deceased.
requirements.object: to find out the whereabouts of account holder or his/her nominee/legal heirs in case the account holder is deceased

conditions:
In case any response is received from the account holder giving the reasons for
not operating the account
requirements.full_sentence:
In case any response is received from the account holder giving the reasons for
not operating the account, a UCB shall continue to classify the account as operative
for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account
within a period of one year (herein after referred to as 'extended period').
requirements.object: account as operative for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account within a period of one

conditions:
In case the
account holder still fails to operate the account within the extended period
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the
account holder still fails to operate the account within the extended period, a UCB shall
classify the said account as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended
period.
requirements.object: as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of classifying an account as 'inoperative', only customer induced
transactions and not UCB induced transactions shall be considered.

There may be
instances where the customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions (SI) /
auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in the Savings / Current
account or the Term Deposit.
requirements.object: customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions (SI) / auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in t

requirements.full_sentence:
These transactions shall also be treated as customer
induced transactions.
requirements.object: customer induced transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
The classification of an account as inoperative shall be for a particular account
of the customer and not with reference to the customer.
requirements.object: account of the customer and not with reference to the customer

conditions:
In case a customer is
maintaining multiple accounts / deposits with a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a customer is
maintaining multiple accounts / deposits with a UCB, all such accounts/deposits shall
be assessed individually for the purpose of classifying them as inoperative account/
unclaimed deposit, as the case may be.
requirements.object: the purpose of classifying them as inoperative account/ unclaimed deposit, as the case may be

requirements.full_sentence:
In case the account holder is not carrying out transaction and the account is

enable the UCB to transfer the balance from the existing bank account.
requirements.object: the details of the new bank account with authorisation to enable the UCB to transfer the balance from the existing bank accoun

A UCB shall, based on the purpose of opening of
the account, segregate the aforementioned accounts in their CBS, so that the
<image>
stipulation of 'inoperative' account is not applicable to these accounts due to their non-
operation for a period of more than two years.
requirements.object: purpose of opening of the account, segregate the aforementioned accounts in their CBS, so that the <image> stipulation of 'inoperative'

To avoid the risk of fraud, etc., in such
accounts, while allowing operations in these accounts, a UCB should exercise due
diligence as per the extant instructions.
requirements.object: per the extant instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
The segregation of inoperative accounts is required to be done to reduce the risk
of frauds.
requirements.object: reduce the risk of frauds

requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions in inoperative accounts, which have been reactivated, shall
be monitored regularly, for at least six months, at higher levels (i.e., by controlling
authorities of the concerned branch) without the knowledge and notice of the
customers and the dealing staff.
requirements.object: at least six months, at higher levels (i

A UCB shall ensure that amounts lying in inoperative accounts/unclaimed
deposits and reactivated inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits, are subjected to
concurrent audit.

through letters, email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered with the
UCB).

conditions:
In case the whereabouts of the holder(s) of the inoperative account/ unclaimed
deposit are not traceable
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the whereabouts of the holder(s) of the inoperative account/ unclaimed
deposit are not traceable, a UCB shall contact the introducer, if any, who had
introduced the account holder to the UCB at the time of opening of the account.

conditions: if registered
requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB
shall also contact the nominee, if registered, for tracing the customer.

A UCB shall undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts of
the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits.
requirements.object: to find out the whereabouts of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall make available the facility of updation of KYC for activation of
inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home
branches).
requirements.object: of updation of KYC for activation of inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home branches

Further, a UCB shall endeavour to provide the facility of updation of KYC
in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V-
CIP).
requirements.object: facility of updation of KYC in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V- CIP)

requirements.full_sentence:
The V-CIP related instructions under Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be adhered to by the bank.
requirements.object: the bank

conditions: if requested by the account holder
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Additionally, the services of an authorised Business Correspondent of a UCB may be
utilized for activation of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these Directions and
through V-CIP if requested by the account holder, subject to the facility of V-CIP being
provided by a UCB.
requirements.object: of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these Directions and through V-CIP if requested by the account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall activate the inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits, including
those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribunals, Law
Enforcement Agencies, only after adhering to the KYC instructions provided in
the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025 such as Customer Due Diligence (CDD), customer identification, risk
categorisation, etc.
requirements.object: unclaimed deposits, including those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribunals, La

CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the same
or higher level (i.e., through maker and checker).
requirements.object: inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the

System logs shall invariably be
maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts/unclaimed
deposits for concurrent audit purpose.
requirements.object: case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts/unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
The preservation period of such system logs
shall be as per the internal guidelines of a UCB.
requirements.object: internal guidelines of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall automatically intimate the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposit
holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC
documents submitted by them, the inoperative status of the account has been
removed.
requirements.object: account/ unclaimed deposit holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC documen

requirements.full_sentence:
The intimation shall also mention the remedial measures available to them

requirements.object: measures available to them to report unauthorised access

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB
shall have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in
case of inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits are genuine.
requirements.object: operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts/ unclaimed deposits are genuine

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall process
requests for activation of inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits within three working
days from the receipt of the complete application.
requirements.object: of inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on savings accounts shall be credited on a regular basis irrespective of
the fact that the account is in operation or not.
requirements.object: regular basis irrespective of the fact that the account is in operation or not

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances
in any account that is classified as an inoperative account.
requirements.object: non-maintenance of minimum balances in any account that is classified as an inoperative account

requirements.full_sentence: No charges shall be levied for activation of inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: of inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without
pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been
transferred to DEA Fund of RBI on their respective websites, which shall be updated
regularly, at least on a monthly basis.
requirements.object: unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, which does not have its own website
shall make available the above list of unclaimed deposits in its respective branches.
requirements.object: list of unclaimed deposits in its respective branches

requirements.full_sentence:
The database hosted on the website shall provide a search option to enable the public
to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of
the account holder/ entity.
requirements.object: to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder/

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a successful search, details of unclaimed deposits
shall be displayed in a format comprising account holder's name(s), his/her address
(without pincode) and UDRN only.
requirements.object: format comprising account holder's name(s), his/her address (without pincode) and UDRN only

conditions:
In case such accounts are not in the name of
individuals
requirements.full_sentence:
In case such accounts are not in the name of
individuals, the search input and result should include names of individuals authorised
to operate the accounts.
requirements.object: authorised to operate the accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the account number, its type, outstanding balance
and the name of the branch shall not be disclosed on the UCB's website.
requirements.object: UCB's website

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless
there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs
135 to 138 above.
requirements.object: in an inoperative account unless there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 135 t

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall also consider imposing a cooling-off period on
reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be
applicable for newly opened accounts with the UCB.
requirements.object: cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for newl

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data
pertaining to the inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: no unauthorised access to customer data pertaining to the inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also ensure that adequate steps
are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes.
requirements.object: steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall provide on its website as well as at its branches, the information on
the process for activation of the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits and claiming
the balances therein.
requirements.object: as well as at its branches, the information on the process for activation of the inoperative account/ unclaimed deposits and cl

requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary claim forms and documents may be made available
for the benefit of customers.
requirements.object: the benefit of customers

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall conduct public awareness and financial literacy campaigns regularly
to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative
<image>
accounts/unclaimed deposits and the prescribed procedure to claim amounts lying
therein by a depositor or his/her nominee/ legal heir in case of deceased depositor.
requirements.object: financial literacy campaigns regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative <image> accou

requirements.full_sentence:

SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions
mentioned herein.
requirements.object: comprehensive revised Board approved policy and SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions men

requirements.full_sentence:
The existing customers of a UCB who have made an application for locker facility
and who are fully compliant with the customer due diligence criteria under the Reserve
Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025
may be given the facilities of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-
going compliance.
requirements.object: of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on- going compliance

requirements.full_sentence:

be given the facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with
the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Know
Your Customer) Directions, 2025 and subject to on-going compliance.
requirements.object: of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-

requirements.full_sentence:
The due
diligence shall be carried out for all the customers in whatever rights and capacities
they may be hiring the locker.
requirements.object: all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring the locker

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall incorporate a clause in the locker agreement that the locker-hirer/s
shall not keep anything illegal or any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker.
requirements.object: any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker

conditions:
If a UCB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any customer
in the safe deposit locker
requirements.full_sentence:
If a UCB suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any customer
in the safe deposit locker, it shall have the right to take appropriate action against such

requirements.object: take appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall obtain recent passport size photographs of locker-hirer(s) and
individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the
records pertaining to locker-hirer being maintained in the UCB's branch.
requirements.object: photographs of locker-hirer(s) and individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the r

requirements.full_sentence:

branch wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS)

by RBI, for the purpose of allotment of lockers and ensure transparency in allotment

requirements.object: list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall acknowledge the receipt of all applications for allotment of
locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers, if the lockers are not available
for allotment.
requirements.object: all applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall have a Board approved agreement for safe deposit lockers.
requirements.object: agreement for safe deposit lockers

requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, a UCB may adopt the model locker agreement framed by Indian Banks'
Association.
requirements.object: agreement framed by Indian Banks' Association

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall be in conformity with the revised instructions and
the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs
United Bank of India' (Judgment dated February 19, 2021 in CA No.
requirements.object: the revised instructions and the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of I

requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall ensure that any unfair terms or conditions are not incorporated in their locker
agreements.
requirements.object: terms or conditions are not incorporated in their locker agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the terms of the contract shall not be more onerous than required
in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the UCB.
requirements.object: required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of allotment of the locker to a customer, a UCB shall enter into an
agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly
stamped.
requirements.object: with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly stamped

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the locker agreement in duplicate signed by both the parties shall
be furnished to the locker-hirer to know his/her rights and responsibilities.
requirements.object: locker-hirer to know his/her rights and responsibilities

requirements.full_sentence:
Original
Agreement shall be retained with the UCB's branch where the locker is situated.
requirements.object: UCB's branch where the locker is situated

requirements.full_sentence:
There may be instances, where the agreements already executed by a UCB with
its locker-hirer(s) are at variance with the revised Indian Banks' Association Model
Agreement.

In such cases, all the provisions contained in this section, in particular
paragraphs 186 to 188 below on compensation policy / liability of UCBs, shall continue
to apply to them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed.
requirements.object: them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in such cases, the UCB shall have the option to execute fresh agreements or
revise them through supplementary agreements.
requirements.object: execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of stamp paper in such
cases may be borne by the UCB.
requirements.object: UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may face potential situations where the locker-hirer neither operates the
locker nor pays the rent.
requirements.object: the locker-hirer neither operates the locker nor pays the rent

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB,
however, shall not insist on such Term Deposits from the existing locker holders or
those who have satisfactory operative account.
requirements.object: Deposits from the existing locker holders or those who have satisfactory operative account

conditions: If locker rent is collected in advance
requirements.full_sentence:
If locker rent is collected in advance, in the event of surrender of a locker by a
customer, the proportionate amount of advance rent collected shall be refunded to the
customer.
requirements.object: customer

conditions:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers
requirements.full_sentence:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers, a UCB shall give public notice in two newspapers
(including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers
shall be intimated at least two months in advance along with options for them to
change or close the facility.
requirements.object: two newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers shall be intimated at least t

conditions:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or
any other such emergency situation
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or
any other such emergency situation, a UCB shall make efforts to intimate its customers
suitably at the earliest.
requirements.object: its customers suitably at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall take necessary steps to ensure that the area in which the locker
facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins.
requirements.object: ensure that the area in which the locker facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins

requirements.full_sentence:
The risks of
accessibility of an allotted locker from any side without involvement of the locker-hirer
concerned may be assessed and kept on record.
requirements.object: on record

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have a single defined
point of entry and exit to the locker room/vault.
requirements.object: point of entry and exit to the locker room/vault

requirements.full_sentence:
The place where the lockers are housed
must be secured enough to protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and
damaging the lockers in contingent situations.
requirements.object: protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations

requirements.full_sentence:
The fire hazard risks of the area should
also be assessed and minimized.
requirements.object: minimized

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, as per its policy, shall conduct necessary
<image>
engineering / safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary
rectification.
requirements.object: / safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification

requirements.full_sentence: The area housing the lockers shall remain adequately guarded at all times.
requirements.object: all times

conditions: if required as per their risk assessment
requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall install Access Control System, if required as per their risk assessment,
which would restrict any unauthorised entry and create digital record of access to
locker room with time log.

As per its internal security policy, a UCB may cover the entry
and exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera
and preserve its recording for a period of not less than 180 days.
requirements.object: exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less th

conditions:
In case any customer
has complained to a UCB that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge
and authority
requirements.full_sentence:
In case any customer
has complained to a UCB that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge
and authority, or any theft or security breach is noticed / observed, the UCB shall
preserve the CCTV recording till the police investigation is completed and the dispute
is settled.
requirements.object: till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled

requirements.full_sentence:
The security procedures shall be well-documented, and the staff concerned shall
be properly trained in the procedure.
requirements.object: staff concerned shall be properly trained in the procedure

requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors shall verify and report the
compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to

requirements.full_sentence:
All the new mechanical lockers to be installed by a UCB shall conform to basic
standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian
Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry standards applicable in this regard.
requirements.object: / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry stand

conditions: In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system, a UCB shall
take reasonable steps to ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any
breach of security.
requirements.object: ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of security

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers' personal data, including their biometric data, shall
not be shared with third parties without their consent.
requirements.object: parties without their consent

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall ensure that
the electronically operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework
prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The system shall be capable of maintaining
unalterable log of locker activities.
requirements.object: unalterable log of locker activities

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall comply with the relevant statutory /
regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection.
requirements.object: statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a
UCB shall also devise a standard operating procedure for issue of new password in
lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of
electronically operated lockers.
requirements.object: operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of ele

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that identification Code of the bank / branch is embossed on
all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker ownership
<image>
by law enforcement agencies in case of need.
requirements.object: of the bank / branch is embossed on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker
shall, regularly / periodically, check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that
they are in proper condition.
requirements.object: check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are in proper condition

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall permit the locker-hirer to operate the locker
only with the key provided by the UCB, although there is no restriction in allowing the
customer to use an additional padlock of her / his own if there are such provisions in
lockers.
requirements.object: operate the locker only with the key provided by the UCB, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to use

requirements.full_sentence:
The locker hirer and/or the persons duly authorised by him/ her only shall be
permitted to operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording
of the authorization by the officials concerned of a UCB.
requirements.object: the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of the authorization by the officials concerned of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall maintain a record
of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers and the
date and time (both check-in and check-out time) on which they have opened and
closed the locker and obtain their signature.
requirements.object: all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and check-out ti

requirements.full_sentence:
The ingress and egress register for
access to Vault Room by locker-hirers or any other individual including a UCB's staff
shall be maintained to record the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with
their signatures at appropriate place in the records.
requirements.object: the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB's officer authorising the locker-hirer to access the locker, after unlocking
the first key / password shall not remain present when the locker is opened by the
locker-hirer.
requirements.object: locker is opened by the locker-hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that there is adequate privacy to the locker-hirers in
the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time.
requirements.object: adequate privacy to the locker-hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall send an email and SMS alert to the registered email ID and mobile
number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation intimating
the date and time of the locker operation and the redressal mechanism available in
case of unauthorized locker access.
requirements.object: SMS alert to the registered email ID and mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation intimati

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of inter change of locks whenever the locker is
surrendered by the hirer.
requirements.object: inter change of locks whenever the locker is surrendered by the hirer

requirements.full_sentence: The keys of vacant lockers shall be kept in sealed envelopes.
requirements.object: envelopes

requirements.full_sentence: The duplicate master keys shall be deposited with another branch a UCB.
requirements.object: branch a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall
be proper record of joint custody of master keys.
requirements.object: joint custody of master keys

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall conduct surprise periodic
verification of surrendered/vacant lockers and its keys by an officer of the UCB who is
<image>
not connected with their custody and proper record shall be maintained as a proof of
such verification.
requirements.object: of surrendered/vacant lockers and its keys by an officer of the UCB who is <image> not connected with their cus

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that the Locker Register and the Locker Key Register are
maintained in CBS or any other computerized system compliant with the Cyber
Security Framework issued by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: Register and the Locker Key Register are maintained in CBS or any other computerized system compliant with the Cyber Security F

requirements.full_sentence:
The Locker Register shall be
updated in case of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails.
requirements.object: of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB custodian shall check whether the lockers are properly closed post locker
operation.
requirements.object: are properly closed post locker operation

conditions: If the same is not done
if registered or through SMS
requirements.full_sentence:
If the same is not done, the lockers must be immediately closed, and the
locker-hirer shall be promptly intimated through e-mail, if registered or through SMS,
if mobile number is registered or through letter so that they may verify any resulting
discrepancy in the contents of the locker.
requirements.object: e-mail

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB custodian shall record the fact of not
closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the UCB with the date and
time.
requirements.object: not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the UCB with the date and time

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker room shall carry out a physical check of the
locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that
no person is inadvertently trapped in the locker room after banking hours.
requirements.object: check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that no person is inadvertently tr

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have a clear Board approved policy together with a SOP for
breaking open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal
and contractual provisions.
requirements.object: approved policy together with a SOP for breaking open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal an

conditions: If the key of the locker
requirements.full_sentence:
If the key of the locker, supplied by a UCB is lost by the locker-hirer, the
customer (locker hirer) shall notify the UCB immediately.

conditions: if found in future
requirements.full_sentence:
An undertaking may also be
obtained from the customer that the key lost, if found in future, will be handed over to
the UCB.
requirements.object: the customer that the key lost

requirements.full_sentence:
All charges for opening the locker, changing the lock and replacing the lost
key may be recovered from the hirer.
requirements.object: hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The charges applicable for replacement of lost
keys / issue of new password shall be communicated to the locker hirer.
requirements.object: locker hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The operation shall be done in the presence of the customer/s and an
authorised official of a UCB.
requirements.object: presence of the customer/s and an authorised official of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker of a customer or
the articles left by a customer for safe custody of a UCB by any Authority acting either
under the orders of a Court or any other competent authority vested with the power to
pass such orders, a UCB shall co-operate in execution and implementation of the
orders.
requirements.object: implementation of the orders

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected
documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles
in the safe custody of the bank.
requirements.object: about the orders and the connected documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in

requirements.full_sentence:
The customer (locker-hirer) shall be informed by letter
as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that
the Government Authorities have approached for attachment and recovery, or seizure
of the locker or articles deposited for safe custody.
requirements.object: as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the Government Authorities have approached

requirements.full_sentence:
An inventory of the contents of
locker and articles seized and recovered by the Authority shall be prepared in the
presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer
of the UCB and shall be signed by all.
requirements.object: presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the UCB and shall be signed by all

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the inventory may be forwarded to
the customer to the address available in the UCB's records or handed over to the
customer against acknowledgement.
requirements.object: customer to the address available in the UCB's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory
assessment, wherever legally permissible, and preserve the video to produce as
evidence in case of any dispute or Court or fraud case in future.
requirements.object: of the break-open process and the inventory assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have the discretion to break open any locker following due
procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row.
requirements.object: break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row

requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall ensure to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment
and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles deposited by
him/her.
requirements.object: existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles de

requirements.full_sentence: A clause may be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect.
requirements.object: locker agreement to this effect

requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker, a UCB shall give due notice to the locker-hirer
through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile phone number.
requirements.object: the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile phone number

conditions:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable
requirements.full_sentence:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable, a UCB shall issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in English
and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any
other person/s who has interest in the contents of locker to respond.
requirements.object: two newspaper dailies (one in English and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any other

requirements.full_sentence:
The locker shall
be broken open in the presence of an officer of the UCB and two independent
witnesses.
requirements.object: the presence of an officer of the UCB and two independent witnesses

conditions: In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart Vaults)
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart Vaults), the use
of 'Vault Administrator' password for opening of locker shall be assigned to a senior
official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved.
requirements.object: senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall also
record a video of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its
safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in case of any dispute or
Court case in future.
requirements.object: of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also ensure that the details of breaking open of
locker is documented in CBS or any other computerised systems compliant with the
Cyber Security Framework issued by RBI, apart from locker register.
requirements.object: details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Frame

requirements.full_sentence:
After breaking open of locker, the contents shall be kept in sealed envelope
with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer
claims it.
requirements.object: envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it

requirements.full_sentence: A record of access to the fireproof safe shall invariably be maintained.

While
returning the contents of the locker, a UCB shall obtain acknowledgement of the
customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future.
requirements.object: customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the
locker and during settlement of claims, is as per Annex III (effective till March 31,
2026) or Annex XII (effective on or after April 1, 2026, or if implemented earlier by the
<image>
UCB) or as near thereto as circumstances require.
requirements.object: prepared after breaking open of the locker and during settlement of claims, is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 20

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall not open
sealed / closed packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while
releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody
article, unless required by law.
requirements.object: packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article

conditions:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located
if rent is being paid regularly
requirements.full_sentence:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located, even if rent is being paid regularly, a UCB shall be at liberty to
transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the
articles in a transparent manner, as the case may be.
requirements.object: transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma

requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker,
a UCB shall follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 181 to 183 above.
requirements.object: prescribed in paragraphs 181 to 183 above

requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the articles
left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above is incorporated
in their locker agreement.
requirements.object: to be followed by them for disposal of the articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above i

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement
executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in operation
for long period.
requirements.object: are inserted in the locker agreement executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in ope

requirements.full_sentence:
A clause may also be incorporated in the locker agreement to
discharge the UCB from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is
opened by the UCB and contents are released as per law and as per the instructions
issued by the Reserve Bank and the terms and conditions prescribed in the
agreement.
requirements.object: the locker agreement to discharge the UCB from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is opened by th

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall put in place a detailed Board approved policy outlining the
responsibility owed by them for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due
to its negligence as a UCB owes a separate duty of care to exercise due diligence in
maintaining and operating its locker or safety deposit systems.
requirements.object: detailed Board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by them for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to i

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall adhere to the Master Directions on Fraud Risk
Management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities,
thefts and burglaries.
requirements.object: Directions on Fraud Risk Management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not be liable for any damage and/or loss of contents of locker
arising from natural calamities or Acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and
thunderstorm or any act that is attributable to the sole fault or negligence of the
customer.
requirements.object: damage and/or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or Acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and thund

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall, however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to
protect its premises from such catastrophes.
requirements.object: care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes

conditions:
where loss of contents
of locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by
its employee(s)
requirements.full_sentence:
As a UCB cannot claim that they bear no liability towards
their customers for loss of contents of the locker, in instances where loss of contents
of locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by
its employee(s), the UCB's liability shall be for an amount equivalent to one hundred
times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker.
requirements.object: equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, with the approval of its Board, shall have a branch insurance policy to
minimize the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during
shifting/merger of branch, etc., affecting contents of lockers.
requirements.object: policy to minimize the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting/merger of branch, et

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of
the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein by
the customer, they would not be under any liability to insure the contents of the locker
against any risk whatsoever.
requirements.object: agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall under no circumstances offer, directly or
indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents.
requirements.object: directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall display the model locker agreement with all the Terms &
Conditions and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and/or at branches (if
official website is not available) where locker facility is being provided by them for
public viewing.
requirements.object: agreement with all the Terms & Conditions and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and/or at branches (if official webs

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that the customers are made aware of its terms
and conditions to avail those facilities.
requirements.object: are made aware of its terms and conditions to avail those facilities

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit
lockers and safe custody articles on its website.
requirements.object: all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall place on its website, the instructions together with the policies /
procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s) of the deceased locker hirer / safe custody
article.
requirements.object: the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a printed copy of the same shall also be given to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, these directions are issued to
banks to implement the nomination facility and shall be read with sections 45ZA to
45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (read with section 56 of the Act ibid) and
the Nomination Rules framed thereunder.
requirements.object: 45ZA to 45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (read with section 56 of the Act ibid) and the Nomination Rules framed thereund

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the
provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act (read with section 56 of the
Act) and the Rules.
requirements.object: deposit accounts in accordance with the provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act (read with section 56 of th

requirements.full_sentence:
An UCB shall be guided by the provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act
(read with section 56 of the Act) and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe
deposit lockers and articles kept in safe custody.
requirements.object: provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act (read with section 56 of the Act) and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe de

conditions:
if an individual is
keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, it is clarified that if an individual is
keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business, it will be deemed as that
individual's account and the nomination facility shall be offered in such accounts.
requirements.object: accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of account opening, a UCB shall explicitly inform the prospective
customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him/her the
option to avail the same.
requirements.object: customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him/her the option to avail the same

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB shall also clearly explain to the prospective
customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to
simplification of the claim process in the event of the account holder's demise and
facilitation of smooth and prompt transfer of funds to the nominee without legal
complications.
requirements.object: the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p

conditions:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
being fully informed
if otherwise found eligible
requirements.full_sentence:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
being fully informed, the UCB shall proceed to open the deposit account without
imposing any restrictions, if otherwise found eligible, after obtaining a written
declaration from the individual confirming that he/ she does not require the nomination
facility at the time of account opening.
requirements.object: deposit account without imposing any restrictions

conditions:
If he/she refuses to provide the written
declaration
requirements.full_sentence:
If he/she refuses to provide the written
declaration, a UCB shall record the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in the
account opening records.
requirements.object: refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records

requirements.full_sentence:
Under no circumstances shall a prospective customer be denied or delayed in
opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination, provided all
other requirements for account opening are satisfactorily met.
requirements.object: denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination

conditions: In case of simultaneous nomination

if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of simultaneous nomination, if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a UCB, the nomination in respect of such nominee alone shall become
ineffective.

Accordingly, a UCB shall settle the claims of the amount of deposit made
in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts
without nominee clause as contained in paragraphs 217 to 224 of these Directions.
requirements.object: the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in
its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the
request of the customers.
requirements.object: systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly
completed forms of registration, cancellation and / or variation of the nomination.
requirements.object: acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and / or variation of the nomination

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers
are in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing
acknowledgement to them.
requirements.object: the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing ac

requirements.full_sentence:
Such acknowledgement shall be given to the customers within three working
days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination,
irrespective of whether the same is asked for by the customers.
requirements.object: customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination, irrespective

requirements.full_sentence:
Where a nomination request is found not to be in conformity with the provisions
of the Act or the Rules and is consequently rejected, a UCB shall inform the customer
in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days
of the receipt of the request form.
requirements.object: writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days of the receipt of the request form

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face
of the Passbook / Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination
Registered".
requirements.object: registration of nomination on the face of the Passbook / Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination Registe

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook /
Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases.
requirements.object: of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook / Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account
holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the
nomination facility.
requirements.object: provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n

requirements.full_sentence:
This may include printing compatible messages on cheque book,
passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical
awareness drives.
requirements.object: on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe
deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the
<image>
details of nomination, which also serves the purpose of educating the customers about
availability of such facility.
requirements.object: for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the

conditions:
in case of
Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings
Scheme (SCSS)
requirements.full_sentence:
The directions given in the section shall not be applicable in case of
Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings
Scheme (SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), etc.
requirements.object: of Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), e

requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement of claims in such cases
shall be as per the provisions of the respective schemes.
requirements.object: provisions of the respective schemes

requirements.full_sentence:
For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a bank.
requirements.object: to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank

requirements.full_sentence: (3) 'Threshold limit' means ₹5 lakh or such higher limit as may be fixed by a UCB.
requirements.object: UCB

conditions:
where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of The Banking Regulation Act

where the account was opened
with survivorship clause
requirements.full_sentence:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of The Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened
with survivorship clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death of
the depositor(s) to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid discharge
of a UCB's liability, provided:
(1) The UCB has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s)
by obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-
document);
requirements.object: discharge of a UCB's liability

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) It has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would
be receiving the payment from the bank as a trustee of the legal heirs of the
deceased depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or
claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the
extent of the payment made to them.
requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

requirements.full_sentence:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing
conditions, shall constitute a full and valid discharge of a UCB's liability.
requirements.object: valid discharge of a UCB's liability

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, in
such cases, while making payment to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) of the deceased
depositor(s), a UCB shall not insist on production of legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or seek any bond
of indemnity / surety from the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party, irrespective of the
amount standing to the credit of the deceased account holder(s).
requirements.object: legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc
following documents in such cases: (1) Death certificate of the deceased depositor(s)

conditions:
where the aggregate amount
payable

in case of a joint
account
requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue
hardship to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), a UCB shall follow a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount
payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the
threshold limit, provided
<image>
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint
account, the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the UCB,
restraining the claimant(s) from receiving nor the UCB from making the
payment.
requirements.object: for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
to the threshold limit based on (1) Claim form, as given in Annex VI duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than those

requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to
the threshold limit.
requirements.object: of claims up to the threshold limit

conditions: where claim amount is above the threshold limit
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, a UCB shall settle
the claim based on:
(1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 218 (1) to (3)
above;
requirements.object: on: (1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 218 (1) to (3) above

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a UCB shall call for the documents at paragraph 218 (1) to (5)
above.
requirements.object: at paragraph 218 (1) to (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may also call for a bond of surety, as given in Annex VIII, from
third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are
acceptable to the UCB and good for the claim amount.
requirements.object: bond of surety, as given in Annex VIII, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor
on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraph 218 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addit

conditions:
where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents
shall also be obtained from her / him.
requirements.object: her / him

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the UCB shall additionally
call for the documents mentioned at paragraph 218 (4) and (5) above.
requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraph 218 (4) and (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, a UCB shall settle claims
on the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or
Court order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at paragraph 218
(1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

conditions:
where there is an order from a Court restraining a UCB from
making the payment
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where there is an order from a Court restraining a UCB from
making the payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the order is
in force.
requirements.object: period the order is in force

requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent Court order
to that effect.
requirements.object: subsequent Court order to that effect

requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either
F.1.2.2.1 or F.1.2.2.2 above.
requirements.object: third party in cases falling under either F

conditions:
in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor
requirements.full_sentence:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor, a UCB shall return the same to the remitter with the
remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal
heir(s).
requirements.object: the remitter with the remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect
that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term deposits
would be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the lock-in-
period.
requirements.object: the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos

requirements.full_sentence:
Premature termination of term deposits opened jointly, with or without
survivorship clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal
heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors.
requirements.object: the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors

conditions: in case of joint accounts with survivorship clause

if a specific mandate is
furnished by all the depositors jointly to a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of joint accounts with survivorship clause, if a specific mandate is
furnished by all the depositors jointly to a UCB, either at the time of placing the term
deposit or anytime subsequently during the tenure of the deposit, then premature
withdrawal option shall be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the
depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint
deposit holder.
requirements.object: survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an
order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
requirements.object: an order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023

requirements.full_sentence:
The claim in respect of such missing person shall
be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a
deceased customer.
requirements.object: the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil death
of the account holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
requirements.object: of the death certificate

conditions:
where the aggregate
amount payable
requirements.full_sentence:
However, to
avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to the common person where the aggregate
amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less
than ₹1 lakh or such higher amount as may be fixed by the bank, a copy of the First
Information Report (FIR) and non-traceable report issued by police authorities shall be
<image>
obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the
civil death of the account holder for settling the claim.
