requirements.object: lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the c

conditions:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death
requirements.full_sentence:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death, a UCB shall give access of the locker to such
nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
requirements.object: locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

conditions:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of death
of any of the locker hirers, a UCB shall give access of the locker and the liberty to
remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
requirements.object: locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers
instructed that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor", "anyone
or survivor" or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship clause
permissible under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, a UCB shall
follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers.
requirements.object: the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

conditions: In case of a minor nominee
when sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a minor nominee, a UCB shall ensure that, the contents of locker,
when sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the
guardian whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
requirements.object: of locker

conditions:
If the details of the
guardian have not been provided in the nomination form
requirements.full_sentence:
If the details of the
guardian have not been provided in the nomination form, a UCB shall hand over the
contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of
safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor.
requirements.object: of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
bank for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 229 and 230 above: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly signed b

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall, however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents
to the nominee(s) / survivor(s):
<image>
(1) Exercise due care and caution in establishing the identity of the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
requirements.object: following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): <image> (1) Exercise due care and caution in est

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) Make it clear to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that access and liberty to remove
the contents of the locker is given to them only as a trustee of the legal heir(s)
of the deceased locker hirer(s), i.e., such access and liberty to remove the
contents given to them shall not affect the right or claim which any person may
have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given.
requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given

requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the documents mentioned at paragraph 234 above and being
satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, a UCB shall correspond with the nominee(s)
/ survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents
of the safe deposit locker.
requirements.object: / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker

requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be undertaken in the presence of the
nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two
independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the UCB), the safe
deposit vault custodian and another employee of a UCB not associated with locker
operations, and recorded as per the inventory form given in Annex X.
requirements.object: presence of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (should not

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
then hand over the possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf of the minor, as
the case may be, and obtain an acknowledgment, as given in Annex X, that all the
contents in the locker of the deceased hirer(s) have been removed and the locker is
empty, and they have no objection to allotment of the locker to any other locker hirer
as per norms of the UCB.
requirements.object: possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o

requirements.full_sentence:
Production of legal documents, viz., Succession Certificate, Letter of
Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or Bond of indemnity from the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) shall not be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination.
requirements.object: is any discrepancy in nomination

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 229 to 236 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
<image>
custody of a UCB.
requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe <image> custody of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
However, inventory form given in Annex X shall be used in such
cases.
requirements.object: cases

requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue
hardship to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), a UCB shall adopt a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the
legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to one
or more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.
requirements.object: for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases falling under the simplified procedure, a UCB shall obtain the following
documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Court order, etc.
requirements.object: to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Cou

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit
locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in
<image>
addition to documents mentioned at paragraph 239 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as appl

conditions:
where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable
documents shall also be obtained from her/ him.
requirements.object: her/ him

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the UCB may exercise discretion and act as per 'Will' of the deceased
without requiring production of the probate of such Will, provided the same is not
inconsistent with applicable laws, there is no dispute regarding the Will amongst the
legal heir(s) and/ or beneficiaries named in the Will and the UCB is otherwise satisfied
as to the genuineness of the Will.
requirements.object: as per 'Will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such Will

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the UCB shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraph 239 (4) and (5) above.
requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraph 239 (4) and (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
Cases involving dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and/ or beneficiaries named
in the Will, as applicable, shall be settled based on Probate of Will or Succession
Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order/ decree, as the case may be, and
the documents mentioned at paragraph 239 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order/ decree, as the case may be, and the document

requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the required documents in claims falling under categories at
F.2.2.1 and F.2.2.2 above and being satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, a UCB
shall correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an
inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in form prescribed in
requirements.object: in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for

requirements.full_sentence:
Annex X, in the presence of all claimant(s) or their duly authorised representatives,
two independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the UCB), the
safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of the UCB not associated with
locker operations.
requirements.object: of the UCB), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of the UCB not associated with locker operations

requirements.full_sentence:
Valuation of the contents of the safe deposit locker shall be carried
out by an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex
requirements.object: an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex

requirements.full_sentence:
The claimant(s) or their duly authorised representative(s) may remove the
contents of the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity.
requirements.object: the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity

requirements.full_sentence:
Bond of
Indemnity shall not be required to be given in cases of claims settled on the basis of
legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of
Administration or Court order/ decree, etc.
requirements.object: given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Admi

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 239 to 243 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
<image>
custody of a UCB.
requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe <image> custody of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
However, inventory form given in Annex X, shall be used in such
cases.
requirements.object: cases

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other
documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII.
requirements.object: for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII

requirements.full_sentence:
The standardised forms and other documents required for settlement of claims
with respect to the deposit accounts / safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody kept
by a deceased customer shall be made available in all the branches as well as on the
UCB's website for the convenience of the claimant(s).
requirements.object: all the branches as well as on the UCB's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the UCB shall also
display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the
procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various scenarios.
requirements.object: website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various

requirements.full_sentence:
A claimant shall be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against
acknowledgment.
requirements.object: the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment

conditions:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant
requirements.full_sentence:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant, a UCB shall also issue a confirmation in this regard.
requirements.object: in this regard

conditions: in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents, the UCB shall
intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt
of claim.
requirements.object: the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim

requirements.full_sentence:
On subsequent submission of all the required documents, the UCB shall
issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been received
for processing of the claim.
requirements.object: the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB may provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims.
requirements.object: online lodgement of such claims

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a
claimant uploading the claim form along with the required documents, a UCB shall
send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make
available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim.
requirements.object: through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim

conditions:
if a
UCB requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission / verification
requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, if a
UCB requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission / verification,
the same shall be allowed to be done at any of its branches.
requirements.object: done at any of its branches

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall settle a claim in respect of deposit accounts of a deceased
customer within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of
all the required documents associated with the claim.
requirements.object: respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all th

conditions: In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody
requirements.timeline:
within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, a UCB shall, within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and
<image>
communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for making inventory of the locker
/ articles in safe custody.
requirements.object: days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and <image> communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date

conditions:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 249 above
requirements.full_sentence:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 249 above, then a UCB shall communicate the reasons for such delay to
the claimant(s).
requirements.object: such delay to the claimant(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in cases of delay attributable to the UCB, compensation shall
be paid by the UCB in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank
Rate + 4% per annum, on the settlement amount due for the period of delay.
requirements.object: UCB in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank Rate + 4% per annum, on the settlement amount due for the peri

requirements.full_sentence:
The
reference date for reckoning the amount due and the prevailing Bank Rate shall be
the date of receipt of all required documents from the claimant.
requirements.object: receipt of all required documents from the claimant

requirements.full_sentence:
For claims related to safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, a UCB shall
be required to pay compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day
of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline prescribed in paragraph 250
above.
requirements.object: compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline presc

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, a UCB shall follow the procedure for settlement
of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts
with/ without nominee/ survivorship clause, as applicable.
requirements.object: settlement of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts with/ without nominee/ survivo

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a UCB shall accept the
original certified copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the
country of its issuance in any one of the following modes:
(1) authorised officials of overseas branches of Scheduled Commercial Banks
registered in India;
requirements.object: copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the country of its issuance in any one of the following m

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall continue to spread awareness among its customers about the
benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these
facilities along with the procedure for settlement of claims.
requirements.object: among its customers about the benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these

requirements.full_sentence:
The following instructions shall be applicable in cases of all retail and MSME
term loan products extended by a UCB.
requirements.object: of all retail and MSME term loan products extended by a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit card receivables are exempted from
the provisions given below:
(1) A UCB shall provide a KFS to all prospective borrowers to help them take an
informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised
format given in the Annex XIII.
requirements.object: all prospective borrowers to help them take an informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised format given

requirements.full_sentence:
The KFS shall be written in a language
understood by such borrowers.
requirements.object: language understood by such borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
Contents of KFS shall be explained to the
borrower and an acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood
the same.
requirements.object: borrower and an acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood the same

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The KFS shall be provided with a unique proposal number and shall have a
validity period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven
days or more, and a validity period of one working day for loans having tenor of
less than seven days.
requirements.object: unique proposal number and shall have a validity period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven days or more

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB
shall be bound by the terms of the loan indicated in the KFS, if agreed to by the
borrower during the validity period.
requirements.object: terms of the loan indicated in the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The KFS shall also include a computation sheet of annual percentage rate
(APR), and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor.
requirements.object: sheet of annual percentage rate (APR), and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on
loans.
requirements.object: for charging penal charges on loans

requirements.full_sentence:
These instructions shall be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the UCB
including Cash Credit, Overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc.
requirements.object: credit facilities offered by the UCB including Cash Credit, Overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
However, these instructions shall not apply to Credit Cards, External Commercial
Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured
Obligations which are covered under product specific directions, as also other foreign
currency loans.
requirements.object: External Commercial Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which are cov

conditions: if charged
requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Penalty, if charged, for non-compliance of material terms and conditions of
loan contract by the borrower shall be treated as 'penal charges' and shall not
<image>
be levied in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest
charged on the advances.
requirements.object: the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no capitalisation of penal charges,
i.e., no further interest computed on such charges.
requirements.object: penal charges, i

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, a UCB may charge interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid
EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at
the penal rate of interest.
requirements.object: interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall put in place an appropriate policy framework meeting the following
requirements for implementation and compliance:
(1) At the time of sanction, a UCB shall clearly communicate to the borrowers
about the possible impact of change in benchmark interest rate on the loan
leading to changes in EMI and / or tenor or both.
requirements.object: appropriate policy framework meeting the following requirements for implementation and compliance: (1) At the time of sanction, a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, any increase
in the EMI / tenor or both on account of the above shall be communicated to
the borrower immediately through appropriate channels.
requirements.object: borrower immediately through appropriate channels

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At the time of reset of interest rates, a UCB may, at its option, provide a choice
to the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy.
requirements.object: provide a choice to the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy, inter alia, may also specify the number of times a borrower will be
allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: of times a borrower will be allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The borrowers shall also be given the choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI
or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options;
requirements.object: choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options

requirements.full_sentence:
Levy of
foreclosure charges/ pre-payment penalty shall be subject to extant
instructions.
requirements.object: instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
a UCB shall provide the following options to the
borrowers:
requirements.object: to the borrowers:

conditions: In case of personal loans linked to an external benchmark
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of personal loans linked to an external benchmark, a UCB
shall put in place adequate information systems to monitor transmission of changes in
the benchmark rate to the lending rate.
requirements.object: information systems to monitor transmission of changes in the benchmark rate to the lending rate

conditions:
In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned to individual borrowers
on or before December 31
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned to individual borrowers
on or before December 31, 2025, a UCB shall not charge pre-payment charges.

A UCB shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
charges on loans and advances sanctioned or renewed on or after January 1, 2026:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to
individuals, with or without co-obligant(s), a UCB shall not levy pre-payment
charges.

(i) A Tier 4 UCB shall not levy prepayment charges on all floating rate loans
/ advances granted for business purpose to individuals and Micro and
Small Enterprises (MSEs), with or without co-obligant(s).
requirements.object: all floating rate loans / advances granted for business purpose to individuals and Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs), with

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A Tier 3 UCB shall not levy any pre-payment charges on all floating rate
loans / advances granted for business purpose to individuals and MSEs,
with or without co-obligant(s), with sanctioned amount/ limit up to ₹50 lakh.
requirements.object: on all floating rate loans / advances granted for business purpose to individuals and MSEs, with or without co-obligant(s

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Directions at paragraph 261(1) and (2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part
or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
requirements.object: the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Applicability of above Directions for dual / special rate (combination of fixed
and floating rate) loans shall depend on whether the loan is on floating rate at
the time of pre-payment.
requirements.object: loan is on floating rate at the time of pre-payment

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraph 261(1) and (2) above, pre-
payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of a UCB.
requirements.object: approved policy of a UCB

conditions: in case of term loans
if levied by a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of term loans, pre-payment charges, if levied by a UCB, shall
be based on the amount being prepaid.
requirements.object: amount being prepaid

conditions:
In case of cash credit/ overdraft
facilities
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of cash credit/ overdraft
facilities, pre-payment charges on closure of the facility before the due date
shall be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit.
requirements.object: amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

conditions: In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities
provided that the facility gets closed on the due date
requirements.full_sentence:
(6) In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities, no pre-payment charges shall be
applicable if the borrower intimates a UCB of his / her / its intention not to
renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement,
provided that the facility gets closed on the due date.
requirements.object: borrower intimates a UCB of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(7) A UCB shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the
instance of the bank.
requirements.object: pre-payment is effected at the instance of the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The applicability or otherwise of pre-payment charges shall be clearly
disclosed in the sanction letter and loan agreement.
requirements.object: the sanction letter and loan agreement

conditions:
in case of loans
and advances where KFS is to be provided as specified in paragraph 256
above
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case of loans
and advances where KFS is to be provided as specified in paragraph 256
above, the same shall also be mentioned in the KFS.
requirements.object: the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
No pre-payment charges
which have not been disclosed as specified herein shall be charged by a UCB.
requirements.object: UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) A UCB shall not levy any charges/ fees retrospectively at the time of pre-
payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the UCB.
requirements.object: retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall release all the original movable / immovable property documents
and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full
repayment/ settlement of the loan account.
requirements.object: movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full

conditions:
where the loan
account was serviced or any other office of a UCB where the documents are available
requirements.full_sentence:
The borrower shall be given the option of collecting the original movable /
immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan
account was serviced or any other office of a UCB where the documents are available,
as per her / his preference.
requirements.object: of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w

requirements.full_sentence:
The timeline and place of return of original movable / immovable property
documents shall be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after December
1, 2023.
requirements.object: loan sanction letters issued on or after December 1, 2023

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to address the contingent event of demise of the sole borrower or joint
borrowers, a UCB shall have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable /
immovable property documents to the legal heirs.
requirements.object: out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heirs

requirements.full_sentence:
Such procedure shall be displayed
on the website of a UCB along with other similar policies and procedures for customer
information.
requirements.object: website of a UCB along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of
original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction
form with relevant registry beyond 30 days after full repayment / settlement of loan.
requirements.object: reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f

conditions: where the delay is attributable to a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
In
<image>
case where the delay is attributable to a UCB, it shall compensate the borrower at the
rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay.
requirements.object: the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay

conditions: In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents,
either in part or in full, the bank shall assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate /
certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the
associated costs, in addition to paying compensation as indicated at paragraph 266
above.
requirements.object: obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad

requirements.full_sentence:
The compensation provided under these directions shall be without prejudice
to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
requirements.object: the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not insist upon legal representation for release of other assets of
deceased customers irrespective of the amount involved.
requirements.object: for release of other assets of deceased customers irrespective of the amount involved

requirements.full_sentence:
The UCB may, however, call
for succession certificates from legal heirs of deceased borrowers in cases where
there are disputes and all legal heirs do not join in indemnifying the bank or in certain
other exceptional cases where a bank has a reasonable doubt about the genuineness
of the claimant/s being the only legal heir/s of the borrower.
requirements.object: succession certificates from legal heirs of deceased borrowers in cases where there are disputes and all legal heirs do not join i

requirements.full_sentence:
The below instructions shall be complied with as expeditiously as possible but
no later than April 1, 2026.
requirements.object: expeditiously as possible but no later than April 1, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on lending against gold and silver collateral as required in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025
(hereinafter referred to as the 'policy' in this section) / SOPs prepared under the policy
shall cover the conduct related aspects relating to:
(1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver
("eligible collateral" for this section);
requirements.object: aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collatera

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, which provides or intends to provide loans against eligible collateral
shall ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold
and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc.
requirements.object: procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc

requirements.full_sentence:
This procedure shall be
adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any
deviation.
requirements.object: all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall display on its website the methodology adopted by it for
determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and
the price used to value the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral for
determination of LTV ratio.
requirements.object: the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral
at the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
The deductions relating to stone weight, fastenings,
etc., as part of the assaying procedure shall be explained to the borrower(s) and details
incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 278 below.
requirements.object: borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 278 below

requirements.full_sentence:
Post pledging, cases involving loss of gold or silver collateral and any
deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral shall be recorded and
communicated promptly to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: promptly to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
The process for making
reimbursement or compensation as per the policy or SOP shall also be communicated
<image>
to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence: Documentation shall be standardised across all branches of a UCB.
requirements.object: branches of a UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan agreement shall cover the description of the eligible collateral taken
as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the
circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which
shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction
is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or
settlement of loan, refund of surplus, if any, from the auction of the pledged eligible
collateral and other necessary details.
requirements.object: the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus

requirements.full_sentence:
All applicable charges payable by the borrower,
including those related to assaying, auction, etc., shall be clearly included in the loan
agreement and KFS.
requirements.object: the loan agreement and KFS
e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of

requirements.full_sentence:
and the value of collateral arrived at
the time of sanction One copy of the certificate or e-certificate shall be kept as part of
the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their
acknowledgement.
requirements.object: of the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
All communication with the borrower, especially, the terms and conditions of
the loan, or other important communication which affects the interest of the borrower
or the UCB, shall be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the
borrower.
requirements.object: of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
For an illiterate borrower, important terms and conditions shall be explained
in the presence of a witness, who shall not be an employee of the UCB.
requirements.object: the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place
and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are
sanctioned against gold or silver collateral.
requirements.object: and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall ensure that the gold and/ or silver
collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees.
requirements.object: and/ or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its
employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver.
requirements.object: in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver

requirements.full_sentence:
Normally, such
loans shall not be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility
for storage of the pledged eligible collateral.
requirements.object: that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral may be transported from one branch to another
branch, only as permitted under paragraph 291 below or in case of shifting or closure
of branch(es) or exceptional reasons as per the process laid down by a UCB in terms
of its policy.
requirements.object: branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 291 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the
eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal audit
of all procedures to ensure that these are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of internal audit, a UCB shall carry out periodic surprise verification of
the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof.
requirements.object: verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
A
clause in the loan agreement shall be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s)
to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even
in their absence during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the

requirements.full_sentence:
This aspect shall be specifically
communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a
maximum period of seven working days upon full repayment or settlement of the loan.
requirements.object: pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of release of pledged eligible collateral to the borrower(s) / legal
heir(s), the collateral shall be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate to
the borrowers' satisfaction.
requirements.object: as per details in the certificate to the borrowers' satisfaction

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as
applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues
prior to initiating the auction procedure.
requirements.object: the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the notice and acknowledgement
thereof shall be kept on record in both scenarios.
requirements.object: in both scenarios

conditions:
provided that a period of one month has lapsed
from the date of the public notice
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the UCB is unable to locate
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) despite best efforts and even after issuance of a public
<image>
notice, it may proceed with the auction, provided that a period of one month has lapsed
from the date of the public notice.
requirements.object: month has lapsed from the date of the public notice

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include,
inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at
least two newspapers, one in the regional language and another in a national daily.
requirements.object: procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral shall be auctioned by the UCB only through its
employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled
by the UCB as per its policy.
requirements.object: UCB only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by the UCB as per its poli

conditions:
where auctions are conducted by a UCB through
their employees
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where auctions are conducted by a UCB through
their employees, necessary safeguards such as surprise visits by regional/ controlling
officials on periodic basis, coverage under internal audit, etc., shall be put in place.

A UCB shall declare a reserve price for the gold and silver collateral at the time
of auction, which shall not be less than 90 per cent of its current value.
requirements.object: per cent of its current value

conditions: Provided that in case auctions fail twice
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case auctions fail twice, a reserve price not less than 85 per cent of
its current value shall be adopted.

The first auction shall be conducted physically in the same district in which the
lending branch is located.
requirements.object: the same district in which the lending branch is located

conditions: in case of failure of first auction
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of failure of first auction, a UCB may
conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction.
requirements.object: an adjoining district or conduct online auction

requirements.full_sentence:
As a matter of policy, a UCB or its related parties shall not participate in the
auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest.
requirements.object: to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest

requirements.full_sentence:
After the auction, a UCB shall mandatorily provide full details of the value
fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
requirements.object: of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

conditions: if any, from the auction of the gold or silver collateral
requirements.full_sentence:
The
surplus, if any, from the auction of the gold or silver collateral, shall be refunded to the
borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the
date of receipt of the full auction proceeds.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may recover shortfall, if any, as per
terms of the loan agreement.

conditions:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by a UCB during the
tenor of loan
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by a UCB during the
tenor of loan, the cost of repair shall be borne by the UCB.
requirements.object: UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss of the pledged eligible collateral and / or any loss emanating
from deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
<image>
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral, a UCB shall suitably
compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: / legal heir(s)

conditions:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan by the borrower
where reasons for delay are attributable to a UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan by the borrower, where reasons for delay are attributable to a UCB,
the UCB shall compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each
day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 285 above.
requirements.object: legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 285 above

conditions:
If the delay is
not attributable to the UCB
requirements.full_sentence:
If the delay is
not attributable to the UCB, it shall communicate reasons for such delay to the
borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) has not
approached the UCB for release of pledged eligible collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan, the UCB shall issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile number are registered with the
bank.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged gold and / or silver collateral lying with a UCB beyond two years
from the date of full repayment or settlement of loan shall be treated as unclaimed.

The UCB shall periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and / or silver
collateral.
requirements.object: to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and / or silve

requirements.full_sentence:
A report on unclaimed gold / or silver collateral shall be put up to the Customer
Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a
review.
requirements.object: the Customer Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing
unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral.
requirements.object: misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans
against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on outsourcing
and recovery practices.
requirements.object: for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou

requirements.full_sentence:
For prudential related aspects, the UCB shall be guided by the instructions
contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve
<image>
Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: instructions contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve <image> Bank of India (Urban Co-oper

requirements.full_sentence:
A Fair Practices Code (FPC) for microfinance loans based on these directions
shall be put in place by a UCB with the approval of its Board.
requirements.object: by a UCB with the approval of its Board

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC shall be
displayed by a UCB in all its offices and on its website.
requirements.object: UCB in all its offices and on its website

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC should be issued in
a language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: language understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a
language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a language understood by the borrower
to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) Information which adequately identifies the borrower

requirements.full_sentence: All entries in the loan card shall be in a language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Issuance of non-credit products shall be with full consent of the borrowers and
fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the
loan card itself.
requirements.object: of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself

requirements.full_sentence: There shall be no pre-payment charge levied on microfinance loans.
requirements.object: levied on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
Charges,
if any, for delayed payment shall be applied on the overdue amount and not on the
entire loan amount.
requirements.object: overdue amount and not on the entire loan amount

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall prominently display the minimum, maximum and average interest
rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information
<image>
booklets/ pamphlets) issued by it and details on its website.
requirements.object: maximum and average interest rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information <

requirements.full_sentence:
This information shall also
be included in the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny.
requirements.object: the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny

requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in interest rate or any other charge shall be informed to the
borrower well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively.
requirements.object: borrower well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of their awareness campaigns, Self-Regulatory Organisations (SROs) /
other industry associations may publish the range of interest rates on microfinance
loans charged by their members operating in a district.
requirements.object: interest rates on microfinance loans charged by their members operating in a district

requirements.full_sentence:
SROs / other industry
associations may also sensitize their members against charging of usurious interest
rates.
requirements.object: against charging of usurious interest rates

requirements.full_sentence:
RBI shall also make available information regarding interest charged by a UCB
on microfinance loans.
requirements.object: regarding interest charged by a UCB on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have a board-approved policy regarding the conduct of employees
and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring.
requirements.object: regarding the conduct of employees and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy shall, inter alia,
lay down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools
to deal with the customers.
requirements.object: down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools to deal with the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Training to employees shall include programs to inculcate
appropriate behavior towards customers.
requirements.object: appropriate behavior towards customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Conduct of employees towards customers
shall also be incorporated appropriately in their compensation matrix.
requirements.object: in their compensation matrix

requirements.full_sentence:
Field staff shall be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income
and existing debt of the household.
requirements.object: necessary enquiries regarding the income and existing debt of the household

requirements.full_sentence: Training, if any, offered to the borrowers shall be free of cost.

A UCB shall put in place a mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing
repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them
necessary guidance about the recourse available.
requirements.object: mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery shall be made at a designated / central designated place decided
mutually by the borrower and the UCB.
requirements.object: designated / central designated place decided mutually by the borrower and the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
However, field staff shall be allowed to make
recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to
appear at the designated / central designated place on two or more successive
occasions.
requirements.object: recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to appear at the designated / central designated p

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB or its agent shall not engage in any harsh methods towards recovery.
requirements.object: methods towards recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
Without limiting the general application of the foregoing, following practices shall be
deemed as harsh:
(1) Use of threatening or abusive language
(2) Persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a.m.
requirements.object: (1) Use of threatening or abusive language (2) Persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Harassing relatives, friends, or co-workers of the borrower
(4) Publishing the name of borrowers
(5) Use or threat of use of violence or other similar means to harm the borrower
or borrower's family / assets / reputation
(6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of
non-repayment.
requirements.object: or borrower's family / assets / reputation (6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non-re

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related
grievances.
requirements.object: for redressal of recovery related grievances

requirements.full_sentence:
The details of this mechanism shall be provided to the borrower at the
time of loan disbursal.
requirements.object: borrower at the time of loan disbursal

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery agents shall mean agencies engaged by a UCB for recovery of dues
from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies.
requirements.object: a UCB for recovery of dues from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery
agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process.
requirements.object: process in place for engagement of recovery agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process

requirements.full_sentence:
A
UCB shall ensure that the recovery agents engaged by them carry out verification of
the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification.
requirements.object: agents engaged by them carry out verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
also decide the periodicity at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to.
requirements.object: at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure due notice and appropriate authorisation, a UCB shall provide the
details of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery.
requirements.object: recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
The
agent shall also carry a copy of the notice and the authorisation letter from the UCB
along with the identity card issued to him/her by the UCB or the agency.
requirements.object: of the notice and the authorisation letter from the UCB along with the identity card issued to him/her by the UCB or the agency

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where
the recovery agency is changed by a UCB during the recovery process, in addition to
the UCB notifying the borrower of the change, the new agent shall carry the notice and
the authorisation letter along with his/her identity card.
requirements.object: the authorisation letter along with his/her identity card

requirements.full_sentence:
The notice and the authorisation letter shall, among other details, also include
the contact details of the recovery agency and the UCB.
requirements.object: also include the contact details of the recovery agency and the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
The up-to-date details of the recovery agencies engaged by the UCB shall also
be hosted on the UCB's website.
requirements.object: the UCB's website

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall strictly ensure that it or its agents do not resort to intimidation or
harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt
collection efforts, including acts intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the
privacy of the debtors' family members, referees and friends, sending inappropriate
messages either on mobile or through social media, making threatening and/ or
anonymous calls, persistently calling the borrower and/ or calling the borrower before
8:00 a.m.
requirements.object: or its agents do not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their

requirements.full_sentence:
As such, a UCB shall ensure that it extends necessary help
/ coordination to tax officials whenever required.
requirements.object: necessary help / coordination to tax officials whenever required

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a UCB shall view with serious
concern cases where its staff connives / assists in any manner with offences
punishable under the Income Tax Act.
requirements.object: cases where its staff connives / assists in any manner with offences punishable under the Income Tax Act

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, in addition to the normal criminal
action, such staff member shall also be proceeded against departmentally.
requirements.object: departmentally

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
